tEn: Nemotron 3 Super: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
tZh: Nemotron 3 Super：面向智能体推理的开放、高效混合专家Mamba-Transformer模型
sEn: Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B (12B active) hybrid Mamba-Attention MoE model, pre-trained on 25T tokens with NVFP4, LatentMoE, and MTP layers, achieving up to 2.2x and 7.5x higher inference throughput than GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively.
sZh: Nemotron 3 Super是一个120B（12B活跃参数）的混合Mamba-注意力MoE模型，在25T token上预训练，采用NVFP4、LatentMoE和MTP层，推理吞吐量分别比GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3.5-122B高2.2倍和7.5倍。
absEn: We describe the pre-training, post-training, and quantization of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120 billion (active 12 billion) parameter hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts model. Nemotron 3 Super is the first model in the Nemotron 3 family to 1) be pre-trained in NVFP4, 2) leverage LatentMoE, a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture that optimizes for both accuracy per FLOP and accuracy per parameter, and 3) include MTP layers for inference acceleration through native speculative decoding. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion tokens followed by post-training using supervised fine tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). The final model supports up to 1M context length and achieves comparable accuracy on common benchmarks, while also achieving up to 2.2x and 7.5x higher inference throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. Nemotron 3 Super datasets, along with the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, are open-sourced on HuggingFace.
absZh: 我们描述了Nemotron 3 Super的预训练、后训练和量化过程，这是一个1200亿（活跃120亿）参数的混合Mamba-注意力混合专家模型。Nemotron 3 Super是Nemotron 3系列中首个：1）采用NVFP4预训练，2）利用LatentMoE（一种新的混合专家架构，优化了每FLOP精度和每参数精度），3）包含MTP层，通过原生推测解码加速推理。我们在25万亿token上预训练了Nemotron 3 Super，随后使用监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）进行后训练。最终模型支持高达100万上下文长度，在常见基准测试上达到相当精度，同时推理吞吐量分别比GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3.5-122B高出2.2倍和7.5倍。Nemotron 3 Super的数据集以及基础、后训练和量化检查点已在HuggingFace上开源。

contrib.en: First hybrid Mamba-Attention MoE model pre-trained in NVFP4 low precision, demonstrating stable training over 25T tokens.
contrib.zh: 首个在NVFP4低精度下预训练的混合Mamba-Attention MoE模型，展示了在25T token上的稳定训练。

contrib.en: Introduces LatentMoE architecture optimizing accuracy per FLOP and per parameter via latent-space expert routing.
contrib.zh: 引入LatentMoE架构，通过潜在空间专家路由优化每FLOP和每参数的准确率。

contrib.en: Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) with shared-weight heads enables native speculative decoding, improving inference throughput up to 7.5x.
contrib.zh: 共享权重的多Token预测（MTP）实现原生推测解码，推理吞吐量提升高达7.5倍。

contrib.en: Two-stage SFT with per-conversation normalization preserves long-input-short-output performance while enhancing reasoning.
contrib.zh: 两阶段SFT结合每对话归一化，在增强推理能力的同时保持长输入短输出性能。

contrib.en: Large-scale agentic RL across 21 diverse environments with resilient infrastructure for long-horizon tool-use tasks.
contrib.zh: 跨21个多样化环境的大规模智能体强化学习，配备弹性基础设施以处理长周期工具使用任务。

contrib.en: Open-sourced base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints along with pretraining and post-training datasets on HuggingFace.
contrib.zh: 在HuggingFace上开源基础、后训练和量化检查点，以及预训练和后训练数据集。

limits.en: NVFP4 pretraining increases zero-valued weight gradients due to underflow, though accuracy is not degraded.
limits.zh: NVFP4预训练因下溢导致零值权重梯度增加，但准确率未受影响。

limits.en: Checkpoint merging gains diminish with long decay schedules; only short-horizon merging remains beneficial.
limits.zh: 检查点合并收益在长衰减调度下减弱；仅短周期合并仍有帮助。

limits.en: Long-context CPT may slightly degrade math benchmarks; mitigated by alternating 1M and 4K sequences.
limits.zh: 长上下文连续预训练可能轻微降低数学基准；通过交替1M和4K序列缓解。

limits.en: Agentic CLI dataset excludes tasks requiring pre-existing codebases to reduce engineering overhead.
limits.zh: 智能体CLI数据集排除了需要现有代码库的任务，以减少工程开销。

limits.en: Synthetic data for safety relies on classifier predictions and may not cover all adversarial attacks.
limits.zh: 安全合成数据依赖分类器预测，可能无法覆盖所有对抗性攻击。

items.en: We describe the pre-training, post-training, and quantization of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120 billion (active 12 billion) parameter hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts model. Nemotron 3 Super is the first model in the Nemotron 3 family to 1) be pre-trained in NVFP4, 2) leverage LatentMoE, a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture that optimizes for both accuracy per FLOP and accuracy per parameter, and 3) include MTP layers for inference acceleration through native speculative decoding. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion tokens followed by post-training using supervised fine tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). The final model supports up to 1M context length and achieves comparable accuracy on common benchmarks, while also achieving up to 2.2×\times and 7.5×\times higher inference throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. Nemotron 3 Super datasets, along with the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, are open-sourced on HuggingFace.
items.zh: 我们描述了 Nemotron 3 Super 的预训练、后训练和量化过程。Nemotron 3 Super 是一个 1200 亿（120 亿活跃）参数的混合 Mamba-注意力机制专家混合模型。它是 Nemotron 3 系列中第一个 1) 在 NVFP4 中预训练，2) 利用 LatentMoE（一种新的专家混合架构，针对每 FLOP 准确率和每参数准确率进行优化），以及 3) 包含 MTP 层以通过原生推测解码加速推理的模型。我们在 25 万亿个 token 上预训练了 Nemotron 3 Super，然后使用监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）进行后训练。最终模型支持高达 1M 的上下文长度，在常见基准测试上达到可比的准确率，同时与 GPT-OSS-120B 和 Qwen3.5-122B 相比，推理吞吐量分别提高了 2.2 倍和 7.5 倍。Nemotron 3 Super 数据集以及基础、后训练和量化检查点已在 HuggingFace 上开源。

items.en: The last few years have seen a rise in the popularity of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based Large Language Models (LLMs) (deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport; yang2025qwen3technicalreport; 5team2025glm45agenticreasoningcoding). MoEs help LLMs achieve higher accuracy at a lower active parameter count than regular dense models (dai2024deepseekmoe; lepikhin2020gshard). Orthogonal to MoEs, Hybrid Mamba-Attention models have shown promise in significantly improving inference throughput (nemotronnanov2). We combine these two directions of improvement in Nemotron 3 (nvidia2025nvidianemotron3efficient). As part of our Nemotron 3 series of models, we present Nemotron 3 Super—a 12 billion active, 120 billion total parameter MoE hybrid Mamba-Attention model. Nemotron 3 Super achieves better or on-par benchmark accuracies than GPT-OSS-120B (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel) and Qwen3.5-122B while achieving up to 2.2×\times and 7.5×\times higher inference throughput, respectively, on the 8k token input / 64k token output setting.
items.zh: 过去几年，基于专家混合（MoE）的大语言模型（LLM）越来越受欢迎。MoE 帮助 LLM 在比常规密集模型更低的活跃参数数量下实现更高的准确率。与 MoE 正交，混合 Mamba-注意力机制模型在显著提高推理吞吐量方面显示出前景。我们在 Nemotron 3 中结合了这两个改进方向。作为 Nemotron 3 系列模型的一部分，我们推出了 Nemotron 3 Super——一个 120 亿活跃、1200 亿总参数的 MoE 混合 Mamba-注意力机制模型。Nemotron 3 Super 在基准测试中达到优于或与 GPT-OSS-120B 和 Qwen3.5-122B 相当的准确率，同时在 8k token 输入/64k token 输出设置下，推理吞吐量分别提高了 2.2 倍和 7.5 倍。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Accuracy and throughput comparisons of Nemotron 3 Super with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B. Nemotron 3 Super achieves comparable accuracies across popular benchmarks but provides the highest inference throughput; on 8k input sequence lengths and 64k output sequence lengths, Nemotron 3 Super provides up to 2.2×\times and 7.5×\times higher throughput than GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. We measured throughput on B200 GPUs with vLLM and TRT-LLM and use the best out of the two frameworks for each model. For GPT-OSS-120B we use MXFP4 weights, MXFP8 activations, and FP8 KV-Cache; for Qwen3.5-122B we use BF16. We used the OpenHands harness to evaluate SWE-Bench.
items.capZh: 图 1：Nemotron 3 Super 与 GPT-OSS-120B 和 Qwen3.5-122B 的准确率和吞吐量比较。Nemotron 3 Super 在流行基准测试上达到可比的准确率，但提供了最高的推理吞吐量；在 8k 输入序列长度和 64k 输出序列长度下，Nemotron 3 Super 的吞吐量分别比 GPT-OSS-120B 和 Qwen3.5-122B 高出 2.2 倍和 7.5 倍。我们在 B200 GPU 上使用 vLLM 和 TRT-LLM 测量吞吐量，并为每个模型使用两个框架中最好的一个。对于 GPT-OSS-120B，我们使用 MXFP4 权重、MXFP8 激活和 FP8 KV-Cache；对于 Qwen3.5-122B，我们使用 BF16。我们使用 OpenHands 框架评估 SWE-Bench。

items.en: Nemotron 3 Super is our first model to use LatentMoE (latentmoe_tr) - a novel MoE architecture that achieves better accuracy per parameter and per FLOP than regular MoEs. Nemotron 3 Super also incorporates Multi-Token-Prediction (MTP), which accelerates inference through speculative decoding while improving overall model quality. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super in NVFP4, demonstrating stable and accurate pre-training in low precision. Similar to Nemotron 3 Nano (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen), we pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion text tokens divided into 2 phases. The first phase accounted for 80% of pre-training (20 trillion tokens) and focused on diversity and broad coverage, while the second phase accounted for 20% of pre-training (5 trillion tokens) and focused on high-quality data and benchmark accuracy. Our base model achieves significantly better accuracy than similarly sized state-of-the-art base models, such as GLM-4.5-Air-Base (5team2025glm45agenticreasoningcoding) and Ling-flash-Base-2.0 (lingteam2025every).
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 是我们第一个使用 LatentMoE 的模型——一种新颖的 MoE 架构，与常规 MoE 相比，实现了更好的每参数和每 FLOP 准确率。Nemotron 3 Super 还采用了多 token 预测（MTP），通过推测解码加速推理，同时提高整体模型质量。我们在 NVFP4 中预训练了 Nemotron 3 Super，展示了低精度下的稳定和准确预训练。与 Nemotron 3 Nano 类似，我们在 25 万亿个文本 token 上分两个阶段预训练了 Nemotron 3 Super。第一阶段占预训练的 80%（20 万亿个 token），侧重于多样性和广泛覆盖，而第二阶段占预训练的 20%（5 万亿个 token），侧重于高质量数据和基准准确率。我们的基础模型在准确率上显著优于类似大小的最先进基础模型，如 GLM-4.5-Air-Base 和 Ling-flash-Base-2.0。

items.en: We trained Nemotron 3 Super with a strong emphasis on agentic capabilities. To support this objective, we substantially scaled the breadth of our RL environments, the volume and quality of agentic training data, and the overall amount of post-training focused on multi-step tool-using behavior. To train effectively on this diverse set of long-horizon tasks, we made substantial improvements to the resiliency of our RL infrastructure, enabling large-scale asynchronous training. This expanded agentic training recipe yields substantial improvements over Nemotron 3 Nano across software engineering, terminal use, and general tool use benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们训练 Nemotron 3 Super 时非常强调智能体能力。为了支持这一目标，我们大幅扩展了 RL 环境的广度、智能体训练数据的数量和质量，以及专注于多步工具使用行为的后训练总量。为了有效训练这些多样化的长周期任务，我们对 RL 基础设施的弹性进行了重大改进，实现了大规模异步训练。这种扩展的智能体训练方案在软件工程、终端使用和通用工具使用基准测试上，相比 Nemotron 3 Nano 带来了显著改进。

items.zh: Nemotron-Super-Post-Training-Data：一组针对广泛智能体能力的 RL 环境和 SFT 数据集。

items.en: The report is organized into 3 broad sections: Pre-training (§2), Post-training (§3), and Quantization (§4), each describing in detail our approach.
items.zh: 本报告分为三个主要部分：预训练（§2）、后训练（§3）和量化（§4），每部分详细描述了我们的方法。

items.en: In this section, we highlight the key features of Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base, detailing its hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, NVFP4 pre-training, hyperparameter configurations, long-context extension, and the 25-trillion-token corpus used for pretraining. We also demonstrate that Nemotron-3 Super 120B A12B Base achieves superior accuracy compared to other public state-of-the-art models—including Ling-flash-Base-2.0 and GLM-4.5-Air-Base—across a comprehensive suite of benchmarks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们重点介绍 Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base 的关键特性，详细说明其混合 Mamba-注意力机制专家混合（MoE）架构、NVFP4 预训练、超参数配置、长上下文扩展以及用于预训练的 25 万亿 token 语料库。我们还证明，Nemotron-3 Super 120B A12B Base 在全面的基准测试套件中，相比其他公开的最先进模型（包括 Ling-flash-Base-2.0 和 GLM-4.5-Air-Base）实现了更高的准确率。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Nemotron 3 Super layer pattern. Similar to Nemotron 3 Nano, we use a hybrid Mamba-Attention architecture, but Nemotron 3 Super is the first model to scale sparsely using LatentMoE layers rather than standard MoE layers.
items.capZh: 图 2：Nemotron 3 Super 层模式。与 Nemotron 3 Nano 类似，我们使用混合 Mamba-注意力机制架构，但 Nemotron 3 Super 是第一个使用 LatentMoE 层而非标准 MoE 层进行稀疏扩展的模型。

items.en: Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base scales up the hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture introduced in Nemotron-3 Nano (nvidia2025nvidianemotron3efficient). We extend this foundation to 120.6B total parameters, maintaining a constrained active budget of 12.7B parameters (12.1B excluding embeddings) per forward pass. The architecture comprises three core pillars: sparse LatentMoE scaling (§2.1.1), Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) for inference acceleration (§2.1.2), and a periodic hybrid interleaving pattern (§2.1.3).
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base 扩展了 Nemotron-3 Nano 中引入的混合 Mamba-注意力机制专家混合（MoE）架构。我们将这一基础扩展到 1206 亿总参数，每次前向传播保持 127 亿活跃参数（不包括嵌入为 121 亿）的受限预算。该架构包含三个核心支柱：稀疏 LatentMoE 扩展（§2.1.1）、用于推理加速的多 token 预测（MTP）（§2.1.2）和周期性混合交错模式（§2.1.3）。

items.en: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a promising approach to maximize accuracy under fixed inference cost, allowing models to scale in parameter count while keeping floating-point operations (FLOPs) per token constant. Existing MoE designs are largely motivated by high-level sparsity arguments and optimized for offline, throughput-oriented settings, with little consideration for online deployments that impose strict latency, memory bandwidth, and communication constraints. Whereas accuracy per FLOP reflects computational efficiency, accuracy per parameter captures memory footprint, memory bandwidth, routing-induced communication, and sharding overhead. Neglecting these factors can yield architectures that appear efficient in aggregate compute yet incur substantial inefficiency in practice.
items.zh: 专家混合（MoE）架构已成为在固定推理成本下最大化准确率的有前途方法，允许模型在参数数量上扩展，同时保持每 token 的浮点运算（FLOP）不变。现有的 MoE 设计主要受高层稀疏性论点驱动，并针对离线、吞吐量导向的设置进行优化，很少考虑在线部署中严格的延迟、内存带宽和通信约束。虽然每 FLOP 准确率反映了计算效率，但每参数准确率捕获了内存占用、内存带宽、路由引起的通信和分片开销。忽略这些因素可能导致架构在总计算量上看似高效，但在实践中却产生显著的效率低下。

items.en: Motivated by these observations, we revisited MoE design from a hardware–software co-design perspective. Through systematic analysis of existing MoE systems across the throughput–latency Pareto frontier, together with accuracy measurements and theoretical analysis, we identified structural inefficiencies in prevailing MoE designs that limit accuracy per unit inference cost. From this analysis we distilled the following design principles for efficient MoE scaling:
items.zh: 受这些观察的启发，我们从硬件-软件协同设计的角度重新审视了 MoE 设计。通过对吞吐量-延迟帕累托前沿上现有 MoE 系统的系统分析，结合准确率测量和理论分析，我们识别了主流 MoE 设计中限制每单位推理成本准确率的结构性低效。从这一分析中，我们提炼出以下高效 MoE 扩展的设计原则：

items.en: In low-latency serving, MoE inference is often dominated by the memory bandwidth cost of reading expert weights. Each expert matrix has size d×md\times m, where dd is the hidden dimension and mm is the expert FFN intermediate dimension; reducing this cost therefore requires decreasing dd or mm.
items.zh: 在低延迟服务中，MoE 推理通常受限于读取专家权重的内存带宽成本。每个专家矩阵的大小为 d×m，其中 d 是隐藏维度，m 是专家 FFN 中间维度；因此，降低这一成本需要减小 d 或 m。

items.en: In throughput-oriented serving, distributed MoE inference is dominated by all-to-all routing. Routing volume scales as d×Kd\times K, where KK is the number of active experts; reducing communication overhead therefore requires decreasing dd or KK.
items.zh: 在面向吞吐量的服务中，分布式MoE推理主要由全对全路由主导。路由量随d×Kd\times K缩放，其中KK是活跃专家数量；因此减少通信开销需要减小dd或KK。

items.en: Preserving model quality requires preserving the effective nonlinear budget K⋅mK\cdot m. To relieve memory and communication bottlenecks without sacrificing quality, KK and mm should thus be held fixed.
items.zh: 保持模型质量需要保持有效的非线性预算K⋅mK\cdot m。为了在不牺牲质量的情况下缓解内存和通信瓶颈，KK和mm应保持固定。

items.en: A task-specific effective feature rank reffr_{\mathrm{eff}} imposes a lower limit on how much dd can be reduced; reducing dd below this limit causes model quality to collapse.
items.zh: 任务特定的有效特征秩reffr_{\mathrm{eff}}对dd可减少的程度施加了下限；将dd降低到该下限以下会导致模型质量崩溃。

items.en: Scaling both the total number of experts NN and the top-KK experts per token improves quality by exponentially expanding the space of expert combinations.
items.zh: 同时扩展专家总数NN和每个token的top-KK专家数量，通过指数级扩展专家组合空间来提高质量。

items.en: Principles (1)–(3) imply that the hidden dimension dd is the most promising axis for reduction, enabling gains in both throughput- and latency-oriented regimes without significant loss in accuracy. Principle (4) gives a lower bound on how far dd can be reduced without collapse. Principle (5) indicates that increasing NN and KK improves quality; because memory bandwidth and communication scale linearly with KK, we can increase KK by a factor α\alpha and reduce dd by the same factor α\alpha to obtain higher accuracy at similar inference cost. Guided by these insights, we developed LatentMoE (latentmoe_tr), a MoE architecture designed to achieve higher accuracy than a standard MoE at similar inference cost.
items.zh: 原则(1)–(3)表明隐藏维度dd是最有希望的缩减轴，能够在面向吞吐量和面向延迟的场景中实现收益，而不会显著损失精度。原则(4)给出了dd在不崩溃的情况下可降低程度的下界。原则(5)表明增加NN和KK可以提高质量；由于内存带宽和通信随KK线性扩展，我们可以将KK增加因子α\alpha，并将dd减少相同的因子α\alpha，从而在相似的推理成本下获得更高的精度。在这些见解的指导下，我们开发了LatentMoE（latentmoe_tr），这是一种MoE架构，旨在以相似的推理成本实现比标准MoE更高的精度。

items.en: The LatentMoE architecture is illustrated in Figure 3(b). Each input token x∈ℝdx\in\mathbb{R}^{d} is first projected into a lower-dimensional latent space ℝℓ\mathbb{R}^{\ell} via a learnable down-projection matrix W↓∈ℝℓ×dW_{\downarrow}\in\mathbb{R}^{\ell\times d}. The compressed representation is then routed to an expanded set of experts that operate entirely in this latent space. After expert computation, the outputs are aggregated and projected back to dimension dd via a learnable up-projection matrix W↑∈ℝd×ℓW_{\uparrow}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times\ell}. Shifting routed expert computation and all-to-all traffic into the latent space reduces both per-expert weight loads and communication payloads by a factor d/ℓd/\ell relative to a standard MoE. We use these savings to increase the total number of experts from NN to N′=N⋅d/ℓN^{\prime}=N\cdot d/\ell and the top-KK active experts per token from KK to K′=K⋅d/ℓK^{\prime}=K\cdot d/\ell. The reduction in dimension offsets the increase in expert count and in KK, yielding higher model quality at a similar computational and communication budget. To preserve quality, all non-routed computations—including the routing gate (gating network), shared expert computation, and non-expert layers—remain in the full hidden dimension dd, as they do not contribute significantly to the targeted bottlenecks. We refer the reader to the LatentMoE technical report (latentmoe_tr) for further details.
items.zh: LatentMoE架构如图3(b)所示。每个输入token x∈ℝdx\in\mathbb{R}^{d}首先通过可学习的下投影矩阵W↓∈ℝℓ×dW_{\downarrow}\in\mathbb{R}^{\ell\times d}投影到较低维度的潜在空间ℝℓ\mathbb{R}^{\ell}。然后，压缩后的表示被路由到一组扩展的专家，这些专家完全在潜在空间中操作。专家计算后，输出被聚合，并通过可学习的上投影矩阵W↑∈ℝd×ℓW_{\uparrow}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times\ell}投影回维度dd。将路由专家计算和全对全流量转移到潜在空间，相对于标准MoE，每个专家的权重负载和通信负载都减少了因子d/ℓd/\ell。我们利用这些节省将专家总数从NN增加到N′=N⋅d/ℓN^{\prime}=N\cdot d/\ell，并将每个token的top-KK活跃专家从KK增加到K′=K⋅d/ℓK^{\prime}=K\cdot d/\ell。维度的减少抵消了专家数量和KK的增加，从而在相似的计算和通信预算下获得更高的模型质量。为了保持质量，所有非路由计算——包括路由门控（门控网络）、共享专家计算和非专家层——都保持在完整隐藏维度dd中，因为它们对目标瓶颈的贡献不大。更多细节请参考LatentMoE技术报告（latentmoe_tr）。

items.en: Nemotron-3 Super incorporates a Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) objective to improve both modeling quality and inference efficiency. Unlike conventional next-token training, MTP optimizes the model to predict multiple future tokens at each position (gloeckle2024better; deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport). This encourages representations that capture multi-step dependencies and longer-range structure, leading to consistent improvements in validation loss and downstream benchmark accuracy.
items.zh: Nemotron-3 Super采用了多token预测（MTP）目标，以提高建模质量和推理效率。与传统的下一个词训练不同，MTP优化模型在每个位置预测多个未来token（gloeckle2024better; deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport）。这鼓励了捕获多步依赖和更长距离结构的表示，从而在验证损失和下游基准精度上带来一致的改进。

items.en: Beyond quality gains, MTP enables native speculative decoding. The auxiliary prediction heads function as an internal draft model: during inference, they generate candidate continuations that are verified by the main model in a single forward pass. This substantially reduces decoding latency while introducing minimal additional FLOPs—significantly less than required by an external draft model. Although speculative decoding is particularly effective at small batch sizes, recent work shows that it can also improve throughput in larger-batch and sparse MoE settings (huang2025moesd).
items.zh: 除了质量提升，MTP还实现了原生推测解码。辅助预测头作为内部草稿模型：在推理过程中，它们生成候选延续，由主模型在单次前向传递中验证。这大大减少了解码延迟，同时引入了最小的额外FLOPs——远少于外部草稿模型所需的FLOPs。尽管推测解码在小批量大小下特别有效，但最近的研究表明，它也可以提高大批量和稀疏MoE设置中的吞吐量（huang2025moesd）。

items.en: Standard MTP implementations use NN independent heads, each trained to predict a fixed offset (e.g., n+2,…,n+N+1n+2,\dots,n+N+1). While effective during training, this limits speculative decoding to at most NN draft tokens. Longer drafts require either increasing NN or reusing a single offset-trained head autoregressively.
items.zh: 标准MTP实现使用NN个独立头，每个头训练用于预测固定偏移（例如，n+2,…,n+N+1n+2,\dots,n+N+1）。虽然在训练期间有效，但这将推测解码限制为最多NN个草稿token。更长的草稿需要增加NN或自回归地重用单个偏移训练的头。

items.en: Reusing a fixed-offset head introduces a training–inference mismatch: the head is trained under ground-truth hidden states but, at inference, conditions on its own generated states. This distribution shift often reduces acceptance rates as draft length increases.
items.zh: 重用固定偏移头引入了训练-推理不匹配：该头在真实隐藏状态下训练，但在推理时，它基于自身生成的状态进行条件化。这种分布偏移通常随着草稿长度的增加而降低接受率。

items.en: Nemotron-3 Super addresses this limitation by sharing parameters across multiple MTP heads during training, yielding a unified prediction head exposed to multiple offsets. This shared-weight formulation regularizes the head across prediction horizons and improves robustness to the self-generated hidden states encountered during autoregressive drafting. As a result, the same head can be applied recursively at inference to generate longer drafts with more stable acceptance behavior. While acceptance rates naturally decrease as draft length increases, the degradation is substantially milder than with independently trained offset heads. This enables more effective speculative decoding without introducing additional parameters or requiring a separate draft model.
items.zh: Nemotron-3 Super通过在训练期间跨多个MTP头共享参数来解决这一限制，产生了一个暴露于多个偏移的统一预测头。这种共享权重公式在预测范围内正则化该头，并提高了对自回归草稿过程中遇到的自身生成隐藏状态的鲁棒性。因此，在推理时，同一个头可以递归应用，以生成具有更稳定接受行为的更长草稿。虽然接受率自然随着草稿长度的增加而降低，但退化程度远轻于独立训练的偏移头。这使得更有效的推测解码成为可能，而无需引入额外参数或单独的草稿模型。

items.en: We evaluate MTP quality using SPEED-Bench (speedbenchnvidia), a benchmark tailored for speculative decoding. Table 2 reports the average acceptance length (tokens accepted per verification step) with a fixed draft length of 7. Nemotron-3 Super achieves the highest overall average acceptance length (3.45), outperforming DeepSeek-R1 across all domains and remaining competitive with Qwen3-Next.
items.zh: 我们使用SPEED-Bench（speedbenchnvidia）评估MTP质量，这是一个为推测解码量身定制的基准。表2报告了固定草稿长度为7时的平均接受长度（每次验证步骤接受的token数）。Nemotron-3 Super实现了最高的总体平均接受长度（3.45），在所有领域均优于DeepSeek-R1，并与Qwen3-Next保持竞争力。

items.en: Overall, MTP in Nemotron-3 Super improves both representation learning and decoding efficiency, enabling higher acceptance at extended draft lengths without relying on an external draft model. These acceptance gains translate to superior serving efficiency on Blackwell hardware. As shown in Figure 5, increasing the draft depth (D=1D=1 to D=3D=3) via MTP significantly shifts the throughput–latency Pareto frontier, delivering higher aggregate output tokens per second (TPS) for any given median user latency compared to the baseline with MTP disabled.
items.zh: 总体而言，Nemotron-3 Super中的MTP改进了表示学习和解码效率，使得在更长的草稿长度下获得更高的接受率，而无需依赖外部草稿模型。这些接受增益转化为Blackwell硬件上优越的服务效率。如图5所示，通过MTP增加草稿深度（D=1D=1到D=3D=3）显著改变了吞吐量-延迟帕累托前沿，与禁用MTP的基线相比，在任何给定的中位用户延迟下都提供了更高的总输出token每秒（TPS）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: MTP acceptance rate by draft index on SPEED-Bench using a draft length of 7.
items.capZh: 图4：在SPEED-Bench上使用草稿长度7时，按草稿索引的MTP接受率。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Total vs. user throughput for an NVFP4 checkpoint (TRT-LLM, TP=1, B300 GPU). Comparing MTP off vs. MTP with draft lengths of 1,3. Measured on SPEED-Bench’s Throughput-1k split, with 1k output tokens.
items.capZh: 图5：NVFP4检查点（TRT-LLM，TP=1，B300 GPU）的总吞吐量与用户吞吐量。比较MTP关闭与草稿长度为1、3的MTP。在SPEED-Bench的Throughput-1k分割上测量，输出token为1k。

items.en: Nemotron 3 Super adopts a hybrid Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture designed to maximize inference throughput—particularly for long-context reasoning—while preserving the modeling capacity of large-scale dense Transformers. The primary systems bottleneck in modern sequence models is the quadratic growth of the KV cache in self-attention layers. To address this, we predominantly utilize Mamba-2 blocks (dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels), which operate with a constant-sized state during generation, substantially reducing memory overhead and latency.
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super采用了一种混合专家混合（MoE）架构，旨在最大化推理吞吐量——特别是对于长上下文推理——同时保持大规模密集Transformer的建模能力。现代序列模型的主要系统瓶颈是自注意力层中KV缓存的二次增长。为了解决这个问题，我们主要使用Mamba-2块（dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels），它在生成期间保持恒定大小的状态，大大减少了内存开销和延迟。

items.en: The 88-layer stack follows a periodic interleaving pattern in which MoE layers are paired with Mamba-2 blocks. While Mamba provides efficient linear-time sequence modeling, a limited number of self-attention layers are strategically inserted as global “anchors” to enable full-token interaction and long-range information routing across the stack. This hybrid interleaving preserves global dependency modeling while offloading the majority of computation to the more efficient Mamba and sparse MoE components. Table 1 and Figure 2 provide a comprehensive summary of the structural parameters and the specific interleaving pattern of the hybrid stack.
items.zh: 88层堆栈遵循周期性交错模式，其中MoE层与Mamba-2块配对。虽然Mamba提供了高效的线性时间序列建模，但有限数量的自注意力层被策略性地插入作为全局“锚点”，以实现跨堆栈的全token交互和长距离信息路由。这种混合交错保留了全局依赖建模，同时将大部分计算卸载到更高效的Mamba和稀疏MoE组件上。表1和图2提供了结构参数和混合堆栈特定交错模式的全面总结。

items.en: The attention layers employ Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) with 32 query heads and 2 KV heads (head dimension 128). Consistent with prior Nemotron models, we omit positional embeddings, dropout, and bias terms in linear layers, use RMSNorm for normalization, and maintain un-tied embedding and output weights. This configuration supports context lengths of up to 1M tokens.
items.zh: 注意力层采用分组查询注意力（GQA），具有32个查询头和2个KV头（头维度128）。与之前的Nemotron模型一致，我们省略了位置嵌入、dropout和线性层中的偏置项，使用RMSNorm进行归一化，并保持未绑定的嵌入和输出权重。这种配置支持长达1M token的上下文长度。

items.en: Sparse scaling further improves efficiency. Each MoE layer activates only a subset of experts per token (top-22 routing), enabling the model to scale to 120.6B total parameters while maintaining a 12.7B active parameter budget per forward pass.
items.zh: 稀疏缩放进一步提升了效率。每个MoE层每个词元仅激活一部分专家（top-22路由），使得模型总参数量可扩展至1206亿，同时每次前向传播保持127亿活跃参数预算。

items.en: Overall, the synergy between linear-time Mamba blocks, sparsely activated MoE capacity, and strategically placed attention anchors enables Nemotron 3 Super to deliver strong long-context performance while remaining optimized for real-world deployment on modern hardware.
items.zh: 总体而言，线性时间Mamba块、稀疏激活的MoE容量以及策略性放置的注意力锚点之间的协同作用，使Nemotron 3 Super在提供强大的长上下文性能的同时，针对现代硬件上的实际部署进行了优化。

items.en: Nemotron 3 Super was trained with the NVFP4 pretraining recipe detailed in the Nemotron 3 white paper (nvidia2025nvidianemotron3efficient). All linear layers, unless otherwise noted in Table 3, are trained using the open-source NVFP4 GEMM kernels provided by Transformer Engine with the cuBLAS backend (NVIDIA_TransformerEngine_PR2177) for fprop, dgrad, and wgrad GEMMs. This framework performs quantization of weights, activations, and gradients to NVFP4 according to the scheme first introduced in nvidia2025pretraininglargelanguagemodels. Weights are quantized to NVFP4 using two-dimensional (2D) block scaling to maintain consistency between quantized weights in the forward and backward pass. Gradients and activations are quantized to NVFP4 using one-dimensional (1D) blocks along the GEMM reduction axis. Random Hadamard Transforms (RHTs) are performed on inputs to wgrad and stochastic rounding is applied to gradient tensors. The NVFP4 format utilizes an E2M1 element format with 16-element micro-blocks, E4M3 micro-block scaling factors, and a second-level FP32 global scale. Nemotron 3 Super showcases large-scale stable training in NVFP4 up to 25T tokens.
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super采用Nemotron 3白皮书（nvidia2025nvidianemotron3efficient）中详述的NVFP4预训练方案进行训练。除非表3中另有说明，所有线性层均使用Transformer Engine提供的开源NVFP4 GEMM内核进行训练，后端为cuBLAS（NVIDIA_TransformerEngine_PR2177），用于前向传播、反向传播和权重梯度GEMM。该框架根据nvidia2025pretraininglargelanguagemodels首次引入的方案，将权重、激活和梯度量化为NVFP4。权重使用二维（2D）块缩放量化为NVFP4，以保持前向和反向传播中量化权重的一致性。梯度和激活使用沿GEMM归约轴的一维（1D）块量化为NVFP4。对权重梯度的输入执行随机Hadamard变换（RHT），并对梯度张量应用随机舍入。NVFP4格式采用E2M1元素格式，包含16元素微块、E4M3微块缩放因子和二级FP32全局缩放。Nemotron 3 Super展示了在NVFP4中高达25T词元的大规模稳定训练。

items.en: During the training of Nemotron 3 Super, we observed a growth in the number of zero-valued weight gradient elements and investigated the root cause to validate training health. Magnitude patterns emerged within some expert layers, characterized by the norms of FC1 output channels and corresponding FC2 input channels converging toward zero (Figure 6). By the end of pretraining, zero-valued weight gradient elements accounted for 7% of total parameters, appearing to correlate with the magnitude patterns. We believe that NVFP4 quantization increases the incidence of true zeros in the weight gradients that could have been more easily be represented by BF16 or MXFP8. Low-norm channels likely attenuate quicker when these layers are trained in NVFP4.
items.zh: 在Nemotron 3 Super的训练过程中，我们观察到零值权重梯度元素数量的增长，并调查了根本原因以验证训练健康性。某些专家层内出现了幅度模式，其特征是FC1输出通道和相应FC2输入通道的范数趋近于零（图6）。到预训练结束时，零值权重梯度元素占总参数的7%，似乎与幅度模式相关。我们认为NVFP4量化增加了权重梯度中真实零的出现频率，而这些零在BF16或MXFP8中可能更容易表示。当这些层在NVFP4中训练时，低范数通道可能衰减得更快。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Channel Magnitude Patterns in Weights of Expert Layers in Nemotron 3 Super. Patterns emerge as training progresses. Top: Early layer routed expert FC1 weight matrix at 0.5T tok and 23T tok. Bottom: Early layer routed expert FC2 weight matrix at 500B tok and 23T tok. Low-norm output channels of FC1 align with low-norm input channels of FC2.
items.capZh: 图6：Nemotron 3 Super专家层权重中的通道幅度模式。随着训练进行，模式逐渐显现。上：早期层路由专家FC1权重矩阵在0.5T词元和23T词元时的状态。下：早期层路由专家FC2权重矩阵在500B词元和23T词元时的状态。FC1的低范数输出通道与FC2的低范数输入通道对齐。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Number of Zero-Valued Weight Gradient Elements on Nemotron 3 Nano. Left: Released Nemotron Nano 3 model (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen) trained to 25T tokens in BF16. Right: Ablation study trained to 1T tokens in BF16 and with our NVFP4 recipe. The NVFP4 model at 1T tokens reaches a similar zero-valued weight gradient count as the BF16 model at 25T tokens. Switching from NVFP4 to BF16 at 0.5T tokens causes zero-valued weight gradients to return to baseline levels. The high prevalence of small-magnitude gradients (<1e-12) in BF16 suggests NVFP4 quantization underflows already-small values to zero.
items.capZh: 图7：Nemotron 3 Nano上零值权重梯度元素的数量。左：发布的Nemotron Nano 3模型（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）在BF16下训练至25T词元。右：消融研究在BF16和我们的NVFP4方案下训练至1T词元。在1T词元时，NVFP4模型的零值权重梯度数量与BF16模型在25T词元时达到的水平相似。在0.5T词元时从NVFP4切换到BF16导致零值权重梯度恢复到基线水平。BF16中大量小幅度梯度（<1e-12）的存在表明NVFP4量化将已经很小的值下溢为零。

items.en: We compare identical Nemotron 3 Nano models (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen) trained for 1T tokens in BF16 and in NVFP4 and find that NVFP4 pretraining produces roughly 3x more zero-valued weight gradients at the same token horizon. When a partially trained NVFP4 model is switched back to BF16, the number of zero-valued weight gradients returns to baseline levels. The BF16 model still contains many small-magnitude gradients (<1e-12), but NVFP4 quantization underflows these values to zero (Figure 7). We sampled weight, activation, and gradient tensors from routed expert layers and observed high rates of underflow in dgrad of FC2 at 500B tokens, primarily because two-dimensional weight quantization blocks span high and low magnitude channels. Underflows in dgrad of FC2 create zeros in wgrad of FC1 through backpropagation of the gradient. At 750B tokens, we observe high rates of underflow in fprop of FC1, creating zeros in wgrad of FC2 (Figure 8). The 1T-token NVFP4 model behaves similarly to a much longer-trained BF16 model. After 10T tokens, the released Nemotron 3 Nano model, trained in BF16, nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen reaches a similar number of zero-valued weight gradient elements as the NVFP4 model trained to 1T tokens (Figure 7) and inspection of weight matrices in early expert layers revealed a similar channel magnitude pattern. These conclusions on the Nemotron 3 Nano architecture give insights into the channel magnitude patterns and growth in zero-valued weight gradient elements in Nemotron 3 Super.
items.zh: 我们比较了在BF16和NVFP4下训练1T词元的相同Nemotron 3 Nano模型（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen），发现NVFP4预训练在相同词元范围内产生的零值权重梯度大约是BF16的3倍。当部分训练的NVFP4模型切换回BF16时，零值权重梯度的数量恢复到基线水平。BF16模型仍然包含许多小幅度梯度（<1e-12），但NVFP4量化将这些值下溢为零（图7）。我们从路由专家层中采样了权重、激活和梯度张量，并在500B词元时观察到FC2的dgrad中下溢率很高，这主要是因为二维权重量化块跨越了高幅度和低幅度通道。FC2的dgrad中的下溢通过梯度反向传播在FC1的wgrad中产生零。在750B词元时，我们观察到FC1的fprop中下溢率很高，在FC2的wgrad中产生零（图8）。1T词元的NVFP4模型的行为类似于训练时间长得多的BF16模型。在10T词元后，发布的Nemotron 3 Nano模型（在BF16下训练，nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）达到的零值权重梯度元素数量与训练至1T词元的NVFP4模型相似（图7），并且对早期专家层权重矩阵的检查揭示了类似的通道幅度模式。这些关于Nemotron 3 Nano架构的结论为Nemotron 3 Super中通道幅度模式和零值权重梯度元素的增长提供了见解。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Origin of Zero Element Weight Gradients in Nemotron 3 Nano, shown for routed expert layers increasing in layer depth. Averaged across all routed experts in a layer index. Top: Tensors sampled at 500B tokens. Percent of zero-valued weight gradients are higher for FC1 than FC2 and attributed almost entirely to underflows in dgrad of FC2. Bottom: Tensors sampled at 750B tokens. Percent of zero-valued weight gradients are equivalently high for FC1 and FC2. Zero-valued weight gradients in FC1 are attributed to underflows in dgrad of FC2. Zero element weight gradients in FC2 are attributed mainly to underflows in fprop of FC1, with a minor contribution of underflows in wgrad of FC2.
items.capZh: 图8：Nemotron 3 Nano中零元素权重梯度的来源，按层深度递增的路由专家层显示。平均了层索引中的所有路由专家。上：在500B词元时采样的张量。FC1的零值权重梯度百分比高于FC2，几乎完全归因于FC2的dgrad中的下溢。下：在750B词元时采样的张量。FC1和FC2的零值权重梯度百分比同样高。FC1中的零值权重梯度归因于FC2的dgrad中的下溢。FC2中的零元素权重梯度主要归因于FC1的fprop中的下溢，以及FC2的wgrad中下溢的较小贡献。

items.en: Following our previous work in NVFP4 pretraining (nvidia2025pretraininglargelanguagemodels), we evaluated whether switching all tensors to higher precision prior to learning rate annealing would benefit Nemotron 3 Super. We promoted all tensors to MXFP8 at 19T tokens (1T tokens before annealing) and continued training through 20.6T tokens. While this improved the loss trajectory, it yielded no gains in downstream task accuracy (Fig 9). The final Nemotron 3 Super model is therefore pretrained with our NVFP4 recipe for the entire token horizon.
items.zh: 继我们在NVFP4预训练方面的工作（nvidia2025pretraininglargelanguagemodels）之后，我们评估了在学习率退火之前将所有张量切换到更高精度是否会使Nemotron 3 Super受益。我们在19T词元（退火前1T词元）时将所有张量提升为MXFP8，并继续训练至20.6T词元。虽然这改善了损失轨迹，但在下游任务准确性上没有带来收益（图9）。因此，最终的Nemotron 3 Super模型在整个词元范围内使用我们的NVFP4方案进行预训练。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Improvement in downstream task evaluation accuracy after switching the network precision to MXFP8. Values greater than zero indicate improvement in accuracy over the NVFP4 model. None of the downstream task evaluation metrics showed sustained improvement after training in MXFP8.
items.capZh: 图9：将网络精度切换到MXFP8后下游任务评估准确性的提升。大于零的值表示相对于NVFP4模型的准确性提升。在MXFP8中训练后，所有下游任务评估指标均未显示出持续改进。

items.en: We describe here several new datasets that we added to pretraining since Nemotron 3 Nano (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen). We are releasing these datasets on HuggingFace as Nemotron-Pretraining-Specialized-v1.1.
items.zh: 我们在此描述自Nemotron 3 Nano（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）以来添加到预训练中的几个新数据集。我们将在HuggingFace上将这些数据集发布为Nemotron-Pretraining-Specialized-v1.1。

items.en: With the aim of improving Python problem-solving capabilities, we synthetically generated a dataset consisting Python problems and solutions. Using a taxonomy consisting of thousands of programming concepts curated from our Nemotron-Pretraining-Code datasets and GPT-OSS-120B, we extracted high-level programming concepts from the HumanEval benchmark dataset (chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels). In total, after deduplication of the extracted taxonomical representations, we collected a total of 91 concepts.
items.zh: 为了提高Python问题解决能力，我们综合生成了一个包含Python问题和解答的数据集。使用从我们的Nemotron-Pretraining-Code数据集和GPT-OSS-120B中整理的数千个编程概念的分类法，我们从HumanEval基准数据集（chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels）中提取了高级编程概念。总共，在去重提取的分类表示后，我们收集了91个概念。

items.en: Using the extracted concepts, we performed open-ended generation using GPT-OSS 20B to generate Python programming problems that test these concepts and instructed it to generate the problem with a descriptive function name and problem description in the function docstring. To generate these problems at the pretraining scale, we combined up to four concepts per generation and generated up to five problems per set of concepts. This resulted in a total of approximately 14 million problems.
items.zh: 使用提取的概念，我们使用GPT-OSS 20B进行开放式生成，以生成测试这些概念的Python编程问题，并指示它生成带有描述性函数名和函数文档字符串中问题描述的问题。为了在预训练规模上生成这些问题，我们每次生成最多组合四个概念，并为每组概念生成最多五个问题。这总共产生了大约1400万个问题。

items.en: Following problem generation, we then used GPT-OSS 120B to generate five self-contained solutions for each generated problem. To avoid biasing models trained on these data to generate long-winded solutions, we instructed GPT-OSS 120B to restrict its solution to 60 lines maximum. For each problem, we generate five solutions, and we stopped generating after obtaining approximately 23 million problem-solution pairs.
items.zh: 在问题生成之后，我们使用GPT-OSS 120B为每个生成的问题生成五个自包含的解答。为了避免使在这些数据上训练的模型偏向于生成冗长的解答，我们指示GPT-OSS 120B将其解答限制在最多60行。对于每个问题，我们生成五个解答，并在获得大约2300万个问题-解答对后停止生成。

items.en: As a final step in generating this dataset, we thoroughly cleaned the generated problem-solution pairs. Our cleaning consisted of the following steps: we check that GPT-OSS-120 B did not include additional imports that were not specified in the original problem generated from GPT-OSS-20 B. We discard all solutions that did not satisfy this condition. We form the final problem-solution pair by parsing only the solution provided by GPT-OSS-120B and appending it to the problem generated from GPT-OSS-20 B. We found that GPT-OSS-120B frequently modified the original problem and this ensured we maintained the desired format prescribed in our original problem-formation prompt. We check that the final problem-solution pair is valid Python code via generation of an abstract-syntax tree (AST). If the final function does not pass the final AST check, it is discarded. After the above cleaning procedure, we resulted in the 15 M problems that make up the dataset.
items.zh: 作为生成该数据集的最后一步，我们彻底清理了生成的问题-解答对。我们的清理包括以下步骤：我们检查GPT-OSS-120B是否没有包含原始问题中未指定的额外导入（原始问题由GPT-OSS-20B生成）。我们丢弃所有不满足此条件的解答。我们通过仅解析GPT-OSS-120B提供的解答并将其附加到GPT-OSS-20B生成的问题来形成最终的问题-解答对。我们发现GPT-OSS-120B经常修改原始问题，这确保了我们在原始问题形成提示中规定的所需格式得以保持。我们通过生成抽象语法树（AST）来检查最终的问题-解答对是否为有效的Python代码。如果最终函数未通过最终的AST检查，则将其丢弃。经过上述清理过程，我们得到了构成该数据集的1500万个问题。

items.en: To create this dataset, we generated algorithmic Python problems using Qwen3-235B-A22B (the base model) and gpt-oss-120b. We used minimalistic prompts—such as “Write a function,” “Write a Python function,” or “Write a coding problem and solution for a student to solve”—and optionally specified a difficulty level (easy, medium, or hard). To ensure diversity and quality, we prompted gpt-oss-120b to rewrite these samples to handle edge cases, add unit tests, and reformat the outputs in various ways.
items.zh: 为了创建该数据集，我们使用Qwen3-235B-A22B（基础模型）和gpt-oss-120b生成了算法Python问题。我们使用了极简提示——例如“写一个函数”、“写一个Python函数”或“写一个供学生解决的编程问题和解答”——并可选地指定难度级别（简单、中等或困难）。为了确保多样性和质量，我们提示gpt-oss-120b重写这些样本以处理边缘情况、添加单元测试并以各种方式重新格式化输出。

items.en: In another variant, we instructed gpt-oss-120b to generate LeetCode-style questions and answers, again with a randomly selected difficulty level. We further used gpt-oss-120b to score the correctness of the solution and, if incorrect, to correct it. Overall, such nearly unconditional prompting did result in high rates of duplicates. To combat this, we found it effective to deduplicate based on short titles of around 5–8 words generated by gpt-oss-120b for each problem.
items.zh: 在另一个变体中，我们指示gpt-oss-120b生成LeetCode风格的问题和答案，同样随机选择难度级别。我们还使用gpt-oss-120b对解答的正确性进行评分，如果不正确，则进行纠正。总体而言，这种几乎无条件的提示确实导致了高重复率。为了解决这个问题，我们发现基于gpt-oss-120b为每个问题生成的约5-8个词的短标题进行去重是有效的。

items.en: All samples were decontaminated against HumanEval (chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels), MBPP (austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage), CRUXEval (gu2024cruxevalbenchmarkcodereasoning), and LiveCodeBench (jain2024livecodebench) as follows: First, exact matches of the solution against those benchmarks were removed. Second, we used Qwen3-Embedding-0.6 to encode Problem and Solution and filtered any data with >0.8 similarity with any of the benchmarks.
items.zh: 所有样本均针对HumanEval（chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels）、MBPP（austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage）、CRUXEval（gu2024cruxevalbenchmarkcodereasoning）和LiveCodeBench（jain2024livecodebench）进行了去污染处理，具体如下：首先，移除与这些基准解答完全匹配的样本。其次，我们使用Qwen3-Embedding-0.6对问题和解答进行编码，并过滤掉与任何基准相似度大于0.8的数据。

items.en: Although this dataset is small by usual pretraining standards (0.2B tokens), we believe it helps to teach coding practices like edge case handling and reasoning about program execution, as evidenced by improvements of 1-2 points to HumanEval, MBPP, and CRUXEval-O over the Nemotron 3 Nano base checkpoint, when adding these datasets to a redo of the last 100B tokens of 25T token pretraining.
items.zh: 尽管该数据集按通常的预训练标准（0.2B词元）来说很小，但我们相信它有助于教授编码实践，如边缘情况处理和程序执行推理，这通过在25T词元预训练的最后100B词元重做时添加这些数据集，Nemotron 3 Nano基础检查点在HumanEval、MBPP和CRUXEval-O上提高了1-2个点。

items.en: We generated a diverse set of economics multiple-choice questions across various formats, including cloze, calculation, sentence completion, and multiple-response, covering key topics and terms in microeconomics, macroeconomics, and econometrics (e.g., “Statistical Inference and Hypothesis Testing - Type I error” and “Inflation and the Price Level - Inflation rate”) from a curated list. For each topic-term pair, we used Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 to generate multiple questions, each accompanied by a detailed, step-by-step, and well-formatted solution. To enhance the diversity, we further prompted the model to create new and original questions using the initial outputs as reference points. Each question-solution pair underwent model-based verification for clarity, ambiguity, solvability and accuracy.
items.zh: 我们生成了多样化的经济学多项选择题，涵盖各种格式，包括完形填空、计算、句子完成和多项选择，涵盖来自精选列表的微观经济学、宏观经济学和计量经济学中的关键主题和术语（例如，“统计推断与假设检验 - 第一类错误”和“通货膨胀与价格水平 - 通货膨胀率”）。对于每个主题-术语对，我们使用Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507生成多个问题，每个问题都附有详细、逐步且格式良好的解答。为了增强多样性，我们进一步提示模型使用初始输出作为参考点创建新的原创问题。每个问题-解答对都经过基于模型的验证，以确保清晰性、无歧义性、可解性和准确性。

items.en: We synthesized a set of formal logic problems and solutions spanning several tasks, such as translating between natural language and predicate or propositional logic, deriving the antecedents of conditional propositions, and solving logic problems using indirect or complete truth tables. We introduced variability into the generated scenarios, premises, and formulas by incorporating random personas,222https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/nemotron-personas letters, and/or logic connective (i.e., ∧\land, ∨\lor, ⊃\supset, ≡\equiv, ∼\sim) into the prompt. We generated and evaluated the problems and solutions using Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507.
items.zh: 我们综合了一组形式逻辑问题及其解答，涵盖多项任务，例如自然语言与谓词逻辑或命题逻辑之间的转换、条件命题前件的推导，以及使用间接或完全真值表解决逻辑问题。我们通过引入随机角色、字母和/或逻辑连接词（即 ∧、∨、⊃、≡、∼）到提示中，为生成的场景、前提和公式引入了变异性。我们使用 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 生成并评估了这些问题和解答。

items.en: We construct a multiple-choice question (MCQ) dataset by bootstrapping from the MMLU auxiliary training set (hendryckstest2021), which aggregates auxiliary MCQ data from sources such as ARC (allenai:arc), MC_TEST (richardson-etal-2013-mctest), OpenBookQA (OpenBookQA2018), and RACE (lai-etal-2017-race), etc. Starting from each seed question, we generate multiple similar questions that follow the same task format and difficulty profile, along with corresponding answer options by prompting Qwen3-235B-A22B (yang2025qwen3technicalreport). In the second stage, we prompt the DeepSeek-V3 (deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport) model to solve each generated question by selecting an answer and providing the supporting knowledge or contextual reasoning underlying its choice. To improve answer reliability, we sample multiple independent solution generations for each question using different random seeds. We then apply majority voting over the generated answers to identify the most consistent choice, retaining only those samples whose final answer agrees with the majority and discarding inconsistent or incorrect instances.
items.zh: 我们通过从 MMLU 辅助训练集（hendryckstest2021）中自举构建了一个多项选择题（MCQ）数据集，该训练集聚合了来自 ARC（allenai:arc）、MC_TEST（richardson-etal-2013-mctest）、OpenBookQA（OpenBookQA2018）和 RACE（lai-etal-2017-race）等来源的辅助 MCQ 数据。从每个种子问题出发，我们通过提示 Qwen3-235B-A22B（yang2025qwen3technicalreport）生成了多个遵循相同任务格式和难度分布的相似问题，以及相应的答案选项。在第二阶段，我们提示 DeepSeek-V3（deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport）模型通过选择答案并提供支持其选择的知识或上下文推理来解决每个生成的问题。为了提高答案的可靠性，我们使用不同的随机种子为每个问题采样多个独立的解答生成。然后，我们对生成的答案应用多数投票以确定最一致的选择，仅保留最终答案与多数一致的样本，并丢弃不一致或不正确的实例。

items.en: Using this pipeline, we generate approximately 3.5M MMLU-style MCQ samples (~1.6B tokens) augmented with explicit, relevant knowledge or reasoning traces. We evaluate the impact of this data via ablation experiments by continued training the Nemotron-Nano-V3 (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen) 24.9T-token checkpoint with an additional 100B tokens, out of which 1B tokens are from the generated MMLU-aux-train-SDG data. The results show consistent gains on most of the benchmarks: MMLU improves from 77.22 to 77.51, "MATH Level 5" from 78.55 to 79.05, AIME-2024 improved from 53.3 to 56.7, and MBPP from from 74.8 to 75.2. Performance on other benchmarks remains largely stable with only minor variance, indicating that the synthesized MCQ data primarily strengthens mathematical and structured reasoning capabilities without introducing regressions elsewhere.
items.zh: 使用这一流程，我们生成了大约 350 万条 MMLU 风格的 MCQ 样本（约 16 亿 token），并附带了显式的相关知识或推理轨迹。我们通过持续训练 Nemotron-Nano-V3（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）24.9T token 检查点，额外使用 100B token（其中 1B token 来自生成的 MMLU-aux-train-SDG 数据），通过消融实验评估了这些数据的影响。结果显示，在大多数基准测试上均有一致提升：MMLU 从 77.22 提升至 77.51，“MATH Level 5”从 78.55 提升至 79.05，AIME-2024 从 53.3 提升至 56.7，MBPP 从 74.8 提升至 75.2。其他基准测试的性能基本保持稳定，仅有微小波动，表明合成的 MCQ 数据主要增强了数学和结构化推理能力，而未在其他方面引入退化。

items.en: We adopt the Nemotron 3 Nano data mixture as described in (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen). Our pretraining corpus spans 16 high-level categories. The largest component is web crawl data, which we partition into five quality-based groups following the Nemotron-CC taxonomy (su2024nemotroncctransformingcommoncrawl): crawl-medium, crawl-medium-high, and crawl-high, representing progressively higher-quality crawl data, along with their synthetic counterparts, syn-crawl-medium-high and syn-crawl-high, generated from filtered web documents. Beyond web crawl, the mixture includes math (karimi2025nemotronccmath; akter2024mindmathinformedsynthetic), Wikipedia, code, Nemotron-CC-Code, academic text, Crawl++, multilingual data, finepdfs (kydlicek2025finepdfs) and synthetic SFT-style datasets. The SFT-style data is further divided into general-sft, stem-sft, and code-sft. As part of the SFT-style component, we incorporate reasoning-focused datasets into pretraining, motivated by prior findings demonstrating their effectiveness (akter2026frontloading). Crawl++ consists of OpenWebText, BigScience (laurencon2023bigsciencerootscorpus16tb), and Reddit datasets.
items.zh: 我们采用了（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）中描述的 Nemotron 3 Nano 数据混合方案。我们的预训练语料涵盖 16 个高级类别。最大的组成部分是网络爬取数据，我们按照 Nemotron-CC 分类法（su2024nemotroncctransformingcommoncrawl）将其划分为五个基于质量的组：crawl-medium、crawl-medium-high 和 crawl-high，分别代表质量逐步提高的爬取数据，以及它们的合成对应物 syn-crawl-medium-high 和 syn-crawl-high，这些数据来自经过过滤的网络文档。除网络爬取外，混合数据还包括数学（karimi2025nemotronccmath; akter2024mindmathinformedsynthetic）、维基百科、代码、Nemotron-CC-Code、学术文本、Crawl++、多语言数据、finepdfs（kydlicek2025finepdfs）和合成 SFT 风格数据集。SFT 风格数据进一步分为 general-sft、stem-sft 和 code-sft。作为 SFT 风格组件的一部分，我们将以推理为中心的数据集纳入预训练，这是基于先前发现其有效性的结果（akter2026frontloading）。Crawl++ 包含 OpenWebText、BigScience（laurencon2023bigsciencerootscorpus16tb）和 Reddit 数据集。

items.en: Data blending is designed to balance diversity and quality: sources with comparable estimated quality are assigned similar weights, while higher-quality datasets receive proportionally greater weight in the mixture. Further details on dataset quality estimation and mixture construction are provided in (feng2024maximizedataspotentialenhancing). We adopt the two-phase curriculum proposed in (feng2024maximizedataspotentialenhancing) work. In Phase 1, the mixture emphasizes data diversity to promote broad coverage and generalization. In Phase 2, the blend shifts toward predominantly high-quality sources (e.g., Wikipedia) to refine model performance. The transition to Phase 2 occurs at 80% of total training tokens. The specific mixtures used in each phase are illustrated in Figure 10.
items.zh: 数据混合旨在平衡多样性和质量：估计质量相当的来源被赋予相似的权重，而更高质量的数据集在混合中则获得比例更高的权重。关于数据集质量估计和混合构建的更多细节见（feng2024maximizedataspotentialenhancing）。我们采用了（feng2024maximizedataspotentialenhancing）工作中提出的两阶段课程。在第一阶段，混合数据强调数据多样性以促进广泛覆盖和泛化。在第二阶段，混合数据转向以高质量来源（如维基百科）为主，以优化模型性能。过渡到第二阶段发生在总训练 token 的 80% 处。每个阶段使用的具体混合数据如图 10 所示。

items.en: The pretraining of Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base was conducted using a Warmup-Stable-Decay (WSD) (hu2024minicpm) learning rate schedule over a total horizon of 25 trillion tokens. The learning rate (LR) was warmed up over the initial 200 billion tokens to a peak value of 4.5×10−44.5\times 10^{-4}. Following a sustained stable plateau phase, we implemented a minus-sqrt decay schedule for the final 5 trillion tokens, annealing the LR to a minimum of 4.5×10−64.5\times 10^{-6}.
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base 的预训练采用 Warmup-Stable-Decay（WSD）（hu2024minicpm）学习率调度，总训练 token 数为 25 万亿。学习率在前 2000 亿 token 内预热至峰值 4.5×10⁻⁴。在持续稳定的平台期之后，我们在最后 5 万亿 token 中实施了负平方根衰减调度，将学习率退火至最小值 4.5×10⁻⁶。

items.en: We used AdamW (loshchilov2017decoupled) optimizer with a weight decay of 0.1 and momentum coefficients β1=0.9\beta_{1}=0.9 and β2=0.95\beta_{2}=0.95. The model was trained with a sequence length of 8,192 and a batch size of 3,072 sequences, resulting in approximately 25.17 million tokens per batch.
items.zh: 我们使用 AdamW（loshchilov2017decoupled）优化器，权重衰减为 0.1，动量系数 β₁=0.9 和 β₂=0.95。模型训练时序列长度为 8,192，批次大小为 3,072 个序列，每个批次约含 2517 万个 token。

items.en: The architecture employs a hybrid Mamba-MoE design, featuring Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers with 512 total experts and a top-22 routing mechanism (k=22k=22). We utilized a sigmoid router score function complemented by expert biasing. To ensure equitable expert utilization across the 120.6B parameters, we adopted an auxiliary-loss-free load balancing strategy (wang2024auxiliary; deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport) with an update rate of 10−310^{-3}, paired with a standard load balancing loss with coefficient of 10−410^{-4} (lepikhin2020gshard).
items.zh: 该架构采用混合 Mamba-MoE 设计，包含混合专家（MoE）层，共有 512 个专家和 top-22 路由机制（k=22）。我们使用了 sigmoid 路由器评分函数，并辅以专家偏置。为确保在 1206 亿参数中公平利用专家，我们采用了无辅助损失的负载均衡策略（wang2024auxiliary; deepseekai2025deepseekv3technicalreport），更新率为 10⁻³，并配以系数为 10⁻⁴ 的标准负载均衡损失（lepikhin2020gshard）。

items.en: Furthermore, we used an MTP objective with loss scaling factor of 0.3. To maximize computational efficiency and training stability at scale, the execution utilized a hybrid precision scheme of BF16 and NVFP4.
items.zh: 此外，我们使用了损失缩放因子为 0.3 的 MTP 目标。为了最大化计算效率和训练稳定性，执行过程中采用了 BF16 和 NVFP4 的混合精度方案。

items.en: During the stable phase of the WSD learning rate schedule described in Section 2.4, the learning rate remains constant, and individual trained checkpoints exhibit noisy benchmark performance from step to step. Following recent work on weight-space merging (wortsman2022modelsoup; tian2025wsm; ling2025foundation), we apply checkpoint merging (weighted averaging over a sliding window of recent checkpoints) to produce stronger readouts of model quality without requiring dedicated learning rate decay runs. In a conventional pretraining workflow, evaluating model quality at intermediate checkpoints requires dedicated decay runs; checkpoint merging eliminates this cost. For a schedule comparable to ours, the savings could reach ∼4{\sim}4T tokens of compute (e.g., ∼2{\sim}2 avoided runs at 1.5T and ∼2{\sim}2 at 0.5T), or roughly 16%16\% of the total pretraining FLOP budget.
items.zh: 在第 2.4 节描述的 WSD 学习率调度的稳定阶段，学习率保持恒定，各个训练后的检查点在逐步基准测试中表现出噪声性能。借鉴最近关于权重空间合并的工作（wortsman2022modelsoup; tian2025wsm; ling2025foundation），我们应用检查点合并（对最近检查点的滑动窗口进行加权平均）来生成更强的模型质量读数，而无需专门的学习率衰减运行。在传统的预训练流程中，评估中间检查点的质量需要专门的衰减运行；检查点合并消除了这一成本。对于与我们类似的调度，节省的算力可达约 4T token（例如，在 1.5T 处避免约 2 次运行，在 0.5T 处避免约 2 次运行），约占预训练总 FLOP 预算的 16%。

items.en: Following tian2025wsm, we use a minus-sqrt decay emulation to compute merge coefficients, with checkpoints saved every 1,0001{,}000 iterations (≈25{\approx}25B tokens at our global batch size of 3,072×8,1923{,}072\times 8{,}192 tokens). We evaluated sliding merge windows of 125B, 250B, and 500B tokens over the course of pretraining. On average, across a suite of 12 benchmarks (MMLU-Pro, MMLU, HumanEval, HumanEval+, MBPP, MBPP+, GSM8K, MATH-500, RACE, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande), the best merge consistently outperforms the corresponding trained checkpoint by 2–4 points on the unweighted average. Since merging is computationally cheap relative to training, we can evaluate all three windows at each checkpoint and select the best. Figure 11 reports this best-of-three merge against the trained checkpoint over the full 25T-token training run.
items.zh: 遵循 tian2025wsm，我们使用负平方根衰减模拟来计算合并系数，检查点每 1,000 次迭代保存一次（在我们的全局批次大小 3,072×8,192 token 下，约 250 亿 token）。我们在预训练过程中评估了 125B、250B 和 500B token 的滑动合并窗口。平均而言，在 12 个基准测试（MMLU-Pro、MMLU、HumanEval、HumanEval+、MBPP、MBPP+、GSM8K、MATH-500、RACE、ARC-Challenge、HellaSwag、WinoGrande）中，最佳合并结果在未加权平均上始终比对应的训练检查点高出 2-4 个点。由于合并相对于训练计算成本较低，我们可以在每个检查点评估所有三个窗口并选择最佳结果。图 11 报告了在 25T token 完整训练运行中，这三个窗口中的最佳合并结果与训练检查点的对比。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Average accuracy across 12 benchmarks for trained checkpoints versus the best offline checkpoint merge during pretraining. During the stable LR phase, offline merging yields a consistent 2–4 point improvement. During the LR decay phase (shaded), the gap narrows as trained checkpoints benefit from actual learning rate annealing.
items.capZh: 图 11：预训练期间训练检查点与最佳离线检查点合并结果在 12 个基准测试上的平均准确率。在稳定学习率阶段，离线合并带来一致的 2-4 个点提升。在学习率衰减阶段（阴影区域），差距缩小，因为训练检查点受益于实际的学习率退火。

items.en: During the final 5T-token LR decay phase (from 20T to 25T tokens), the gap between merged and trained checkpoints narrows substantially, and the two evaluation trajectories largely coincide by the end of training. tian2025wsm reported that combining merging with decay offers no gain over merging alone, so this convergence is expected. The original WSM results went further, showing merge-based readouts surpassing decay-trained checkpoints. In experiments on the Nemotron 3 Nano scale architecture (30B-A3B), we were able to reproduce such gains when emulating short (∼500{\sim}500B) decay windows. However, direct comparisons at 1T and 1.5T merge horizons showed no improvement over decay-trained checkpoints.
items.zh: 在最后的 5T token 学习率衰减阶段（从 20T 到 25T token），合并结果与训练检查点之间的差距显著缩小，到训练结束时两条评估轨迹基本重合。tian2025wsm 报告称，将合并与衰减结合使用相比单独合并没有增益，因此这种收敛是预期的。原始的 WSM 结果更进一步，显示基于合并的读数超过了衰减训练的检查点。在 Nemotron 3 Nano 规模架构（30B-A3B）上的实验中，当模拟短衰减窗口（约 500B）时，我们能够复现这种增益。然而，在 1T 和 1.5T 合并范围上的直接比较显示，与衰减训练的检查点相比没有改进。

items.en: Our takeaway is that offline checkpoint merging appears most effective for shorter annealing horizons. This is consistent with ling2025foundation, who employ a comparably short decay schedule and report merge-based improvements, in contrast with the much longer 5T decay used here, where trained decay is able to match or surpass merge-based readouts. The final base model checkpoint selected for downstream alignment was itself a 500B merge; short-horizon merging remains practically useful even alongside a full decay schedule. That said, our experiments explored only a single merge schedule (minus-sqrt) and a fixed checkpoint granularity; it remains plausible that alternative coefficient schemes, finer-grained checkpoint windows, or merging strategies tailored to longer decay horizons could recover the gains observed at shorter scales. Per-benchmark breakdowns are provided in Appendix Figure 17.
items.zh: 我们的结论是，离线检查点合并似乎在较短的退火范围内最为有效。这与 ling2025foundation 一致，他们采用了相对较短的衰减调度并报告了基于合并的改进，而与此处使用的更长的 5T 衰减形成对比，在后者中训练衰减能够匹配或超越基于合并的读数。最终选择用于下游对齐的基础模型检查点本身就是一个 500B 合并结果；即使有完整的衰减调度，短范围合并仍然具有实际用途。也就是说，我们的实验仅探索了单一的合并调度（负平方根）和固定的检查点粒度；替代的系数方案、更细粒度的检查点窗口或针对更长衰减范围定制的合并策略仍有可能恢复在较短范围内观察到的增益。每个基准测试的详细结果见附录图 17。

items.en: Similar to Nemotron 3 Nano, we added a long-context phase (LC-Phase) at the end of pretraining. In the LC-Phase, we performed continuous pretraining (CPT) to equip the base model with long-context ability. We used a constant learning rate of 4.5∗10−64.5*10^{-6} and global batch size of 16. We used 64-way context parallelism, 2-way tensor parallelism, and 64-way expert parallelism to train on GB200 GPUs. We reused the long-context document QA dataset from Nemotron 2 & 3 Nano. We allocated the document QA data to 20% in the Phase LC data blend, with the remaining 80% being downscaled Phase 2 data. We initially performed CPT on 1,048,576 (1m) context length. Such stage lasted for 34 billion tokens. Following that we added another stage to alternatingly train on both 1m and 4k sequences in order to mitigate the minor impact we observed on the math-related benchmarks. The second stage lasted for 17 billion tokens.
items.zh: 与 Nemotron 3 Nano 类似，我们在预训练结束时添加了一个长上下文阶段（LC-Phase）。在 LC-Phase 中，我们进行了持续预训练（CPT），以使基础模型具备长上下文能力。我们使用了恒定的学习率 4.5×10⁻⁶ 和全局批次大小 16。我们使用 64 路上下文并行、2 路张量并行和 64 路专家并行在 GB200 GPU 上进行训练。我们复用了来自 Nemotron 2 和 3 Nano 的长上下文文档问答数据集。我们将文档问答数据分配为 Phase LC 数据混合中的 20%，其余 80% 为降采样的 Phase 2 数据。我们最初在 1,048,576（1m）上下文长度上进行了 CPT。该阶段持续了 340 亿 token。之后，我们添加了另一个阶段，交替训练 1m 和 4k 序列，以减轻我们在数学相关基准测试中观察到的微小影响。第二阶段持续了 170 亿 token。

items.en: All evaluation results were collected via Nemo Evaluator SDK333https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator and NVIDIA’s open source container of LM Evaluation Harness444https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness, unless otherwise stated. For reproducibility purposes, more details on the evaluation settings can be found in the Nemo Evaluator SDK examples folder555https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator/tree/main/packages/nemo-evaluator-launcher/examples/nemotron/nemotron-3-super. The open source container on LM Evaluation Harness packaged via NVIDIA’s Nemo Evaluator SDK used for evaluations can be found here666https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/eval-factory/containers/lm-evaluation-harness. This container is is built on top of LM Evaluation Harness, with the following changes applied to all models for fairness:
items.zh: 除非另有说明，所有评估结果均通过 Nemo Evaluator SDK（https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator）和 NVIDIA 的开源容器 LM Evaluation Harness（https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness）收集。为了可重复性，评估设置的更多细节可以在 Nemo Evaluator SDK 示例文件夹（https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator/tree/main/packages/nemo-evaluator-launcher/examples/nemotron/nemotron-3-super）中找到。用于评估的基于 NVIDIA 的 Nemo Evaluator SDK 打包的 LM Evaluation Harness 开源容器可在此处找到（https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/eval-factory/containers/lm-evaluation-harness）。该容器基于 LM Evaluation Harness 构建，并为了公平性对所有模型应用了以下更改：

items.en: For mathematical reasoning, we evaluate GSM8K and MATH (cobbe2021trainingverifierssolvemath; hendrycks2021measuringmathematicalproblemsolving) benchmarks using greedy-decoding. We also highlight the competition-level slice of the MATH benchmark as “MATH Level 5”. Additionally, we report the pass​@​32\text{pass}@32 performance on AIME-2024. We use Math-Verify777https://github.com/huggingface/math-verify. to grade all generations.
items.zh: 对于数学推理，我们使用贪心解码评估 GSM8K 和 MATH（cobbe2021trainingverifierssolvemath; hendrycks2021measuringmathematicalproblemsolving）基准测试。我们还突出显示了 MATH 基准测试中的竞赛级子集，称为“MATH Level 5”。此外，我们报告了 AIME-2024 上的 pass@32 性能。我们使用 Math-Verify（https://github.com/huggingface/math-verify）对所有生成结果进行评分。

items.en: For code tasks (HumanEval (chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels), MBPP (austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage)) we evaluate the EvalPlus variants along with the sanitization of generations (Liu_Is_Your_Code_2023), in a 0-shot setup. We estimate avg​@​32\text{avg}@32, pass​@​1\text{pass}@1 from 32 generations per prompt.
items.zh: 对于代码任务（HumanEval（chen2021evaluatinglargelanguagemodels）、MBPP（austin2021programsynthesislargelanguage）），我们在 0-shot 设置下评估了 EvalPlus 变体以及生成结果的清理（Liu_Is_Your_Code_2023）。我们从每个提示的 32 次生成中估计 avg@32 和 pass@1。

items.en: General reasoning benchmarks (OpenBookQA (mihaylov2018suitarmorconductelectricity), PIQA (bisk2019piqareasoningphysicalcommonsense), Hellaswag (zellers2019hellaswagmachinereallyfinish), Winogrande (sakaguchi2019winograndeadversarialwinogradschema)) are unchanged except for ARC-Challenge (Clark2018ThinkYH), where we present all options at the same time, similar to MMLU (hendrycks2021measuringmassivemultitasklanguage).
items.zh: 通用推理基准（OpenBookQA (mihaylov2018suitarmorconductelectricity)、PIQA (bisk2019piqareasoningphysicalcommonsense)、Hellaswag (zellers2019hellaswagmachinereallyfinish)、Winogrande (sakaguchi2019winograndeadversarialwinogradschema)）保持不变，但 ARC-Challenge (Clark2018ThinkYH) 除外，我们同时呈现所有选项，类似于 MMLU (hendrycks2021measuringmassivemultitasklanguage)。

items.en: For multilingual capability, we evaluate MGSM (shi2022languagemodelsmultilingualchainofthought) (8-shot, native CoT) and Global MMLU-Lite (singh2024globalmmluunderstandingaddressing).
items.zh: 对于多语言能力，我们评估了 MGSM (shi2022languagemodelsmultilingualchainofthought)（8-shot，原生思维链）和 Global MMLU-Lite (singh2024globalmmluunderstandingaddressing)。

items.en: For long context capability, we evaluate RULER (hsieh2024ruler) using 100 samples per task.
items.zh: 对于长上下文能力，我们使用每任务 100 个样本评估了 RULER (hsieh2024ruler)。

items.en: Accuracy results for Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base with comparsions to Ling-flash-Base-2.0 and GLM-4.5-Air-Base are shown in Table 4.
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Base 的准确率结果以及与 Ling-flash-Base-2.0 和 GLM-4.5-Air-Base 的比较见表 4。

items.en: We follow the same general recipe as Nemotron 3 Nano, with a stronger emphasis on agentic tasks. Figure 12 provides an overview of the pipeline. We begin with a Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) phase (§3.1), followed by a three-stage Reinforcement Learning phase—RLVR, SWE-RL, and RLHF (§3.2). We conclude with a final phase of MTP healing.
items.zh: 我们遵循与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相同的一般方案，但更强调智能体式任务。图 12 提供了流程概览。我们从监督微调（SFT）阶段（§3.1）开始，然后是三阶段强化学习阶段——RLVR、SWE-RL 和基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）（§3.2）。最后是 MTP 修复阶段。

items.en: In SFT, we expand the training blend to cover a wider range of agentic harnesses and interaction scenarios. We also significantly improved our RL infrastructure, enabling reliable large-scale asynchronous training on thousands of GPUs. This infrastructure allows us to (1) train across 21 diverse environments, improving robustness across tasks, and (2) train on long-horizon SWE tasks, strengthening multi-step reasoning and problem solving in realistic agentic settings.
items.zh: 在 SFT 中，我们扩展了训练混合，以涵盖更广泛的智能体式 harness 和交互场景。我们还显著改进了 RL 基础设施，实现了在数千个 GPU 上可靠的大规模异步训练。该基础设施使我们能够（1）在 21 个不同环境中进行训练，提高跨任务的鲁棒性，以及（2）在长周期 SWE 任务上进行训练，增强在现实智能体式设置中的多步推理和问题解决能力。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Overview of the post-training pipeline for Nemotron 3 Super.
items.capZh: 图 12：Nemotron 3 Super 的后训练流程概览。

items.en: For Nemotron 3 Super SFT, we focused on improving dataset quality and diversity. In particular, we scaled up our agentic datasets and increased their share in the overall SFT blend. The chat template remains identical to Nemotron 3 Nano. In addition, we add low effort reasoning mode, giving users further control over reasoning length. We found that a single-stage SFT led to a marked degradation on long-input-short-output scenarios. We therefore adopt a two-stage SFT procedure: Stage 1 emphasizes learning from token-level supervision and induces strong reasoning behavior, while Stage 2 switches to per-conversation normalization to prevent long outputs from dominating the loss, which restores long-input-short-output performance while retaining reasoning. We describe it below:
items.zh: 对于 Nemotron 3 Super SFT，我们专注于提高数据集质量和多样性。特别是，我们扩展了智能体式数据集，并增加了它们在整体 SFT 混合中的份额。聊天模板与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相同。此外，我们添加了低努力推理模式，让用户进一步控制推理长度。我们发现单阶段 SFT 导致长输入短输出场景的显著退化。因此，我们采用两阶段 SFT 过程：阶段 1 强调从 token 级监督中学习并诱导强推理行为，而阶段 2 切换到每对话归一化，以防止长输出主导损失，从而在保留推理的同时恢复长输入短输出性能。我们描述如下：

items.en: For a packed global batch ℬ\mathcal{B} containing multiple conversations cc, let 𝒪c\mathcal{O}_{c} denote the set of output-token positions for conversation cc and |𝒪c||\mathcal{O}_{c}| its output-token count. With token-level negative log-likelihood ℓt=−log⁡pθ​(yt∣x,y<t)\ell_{t}=-\log p_{\theta}(y_{t}\mid x,y_{<t}), we use:
items.zh: 对于包含多个对话 c 的打包全局批次 ℬ，令 𝒪_c 表示对话 c 的输出 token 位置集合，|𝒪_c| 为其输出 token 计数。使用 token 级负对数似然 ℓ_t = -log p_θ(y_t | x, y_<t)，我们使用：

items.en: We minimize the average loss over all output tokens in the packed global batch:
items.zh: 我们最小化打包全局批次中所有输出 token 的平均损失：

items.en: This corresponds to summing the output-token log probabilities across all conversations and normalizing by the total number of output tokens.
items.zh: 这相当于对所有对话的输出 token 对数概率求和，并按输出 token 总数归一化。

items.en: We then switch to a per-conversation normalized loss and average equally across conversations:
items.zh: 然后我们切换到每对话归一化损失，并在对话间平均：

items.en: This stage reduces the dominance of long outputs by normalizing each conversation by its own output-token count before averaging across the batch.
items.zh: 该阶段通过将每个对话按其自身的输出 token 计数归一化，然后在批次中平均，从而减少长输出的主导地位。

items.en: For Stage 1, we run SFT with 256k sequence length packing, global batch size 64, constant lr 1​e−51e-5 with 30k warmup samples. For Stage 2, we use 512k sequence length packing and include long context data with length up to 512K, global batch size 32 and constant lr 1​e−51e-5.
items.zh: 对于阶段 1，我们使用 256k 序列长度打包、全局批次大小 64、恒定学习率 1e-5 和 30k 预热样本运行 SFT。对于阶段 2，我们使用 512k 序列长度打包，并包含长度达 512K 的长上下文数据，全局批次大小 32 和恒定学习率 1e-5。

items.en: We continue training Nemotron 3 Super with the same shared-weight MTP head used in pretraining to preserve both the accuracy benefits of multi-step prediction and the inference-time gains from speculative decoding. Concretely, we train two MTP layers with shared parameters and optimize the combined objective using a scaled auxiliary loss computed with per-token loss and 0.3 scaling factor.
items.zh: 我们继续使用预训练中使用的相同共享权重 MTP 头训练 Nemotron 3 Super，以保留多步预测的准确率优势和推测解码的推理时间增益。具体来说，我们训练两个共享参数的 MTP 层，并使用按 token 损失和 0.3 缩放因子计算的缩放辅助损失来优化组合目标。

items.en: We reuse the following datasets from the Nemotron 3 Nano SFT datasets: Chat, Infinibyte, and Formal Proofs. We refresh the following datasets with new teacher models (DeepSeek v3.2, Kimi K2): Competition Math, Competition Code, Conversational Tool Use, Multilingual, Science. Below we describe new or heavily modified SFT datasets.
items.zh: 我们重复使用来自 Nemotron 3 Nano SFT 数据集的以下数据集：Chat、Infinibyte 和 Formal Proofs。我们使用新的教师模型（DeepSeek v3.2、Kimi K2）刷新以下数据集：Competition Math、Competition Code、Conversational Tool Use、Multilingual、Science。下面我们描述新的或大幅修改的 SFT 数据集。

items.en: Software Engineering. We curate a dataset of coding tasks derived from real-world GitHub issues to train Nemotron 3 Super for autonomous software engineering capabilities including code exploration, task tracking, issue reproduction and bug fixing. We use the issues and containerized execution environments from the SWE-Gym (pan2025trainingsoftwareengineeringagents), R2E-Gym (jain2025r2egymproceduralenvironmentshybrid) and SWE-rebench (badertdinov2025swerebenchautomatedpipelinetask) datasets. For R2E-Gym, we regenerate problem statements with Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct. We distill trajectories from the OpenHands agent harness using Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct as the teacher model.
items.zh: 软件工程。我们整理了一个源自真实世界 GitHub 问题的编码任务数据集，用于训练 Nemotron 3 Super 实现自主软件工程能力，包括代码探索、任务跟踪、问题复现和错误修复。我们使用来自 SWE-Gym (pan2025trainingsoftwareengineeringagents)、R2E-Gym (jain2025r2egymproceduralenvironmentshybrid) 和 SWE-rebench (badertdinov2025swerebenchautomatedpipelinetask) 数据集的问题和容器化执行环境。对于 R2E-Gym，我们使用 Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct 重新生成问题陈述。我们使用 Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct 作为教师模型，从 OpenHands 智能体 harness 中蒸馏轨迹。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Agentic Command Line Interface Dataset Construction & Training Pipeline
items.capZh: 图 13：智能体式命令行界面数据集构建与训练流程

items.en: The landscape of software development has undergone a substantial shift with the emergence of Agentic Command Line Interface (CLI) tools, moving beyond the "autocomplete" era of 2021–2023 into a regime of autonomous execution. Alongside substantial improvements in harnesses such as Claude Code, OpenCode, and OpenAI’s Codex, models are now capable of operating as active digital collaborators, capable of multi-step reasoning, long-horizon execution, and end-to-end task orchestration.
items.zh: 随着智能体式命令行界面（CLI）工具的出现，软件开发格局发生了重大转变，从 2021-2023 年的“自动补全”时代进入自主执行时代。除了 Claude Code、OpenCode 和 OpenAI 的 Codex 等 harness 的显著改进外，模型现在能够作为主动的数字协作者运行，能够进行多步推理、长周期执行和端到端任务编排。

items.en: We established a foundational seed set of tasks designed to replicate common user-initiated operations within agentic CLIs. Refer to Figure 13 where we discuss the full pipeline. We utilized NeMo Data Designer (nemo-data-designer) to generate approximately 20k queries derived from a taxonomy of 24 distinct actions typically performed in these environments. Subsequently, we employed GPT-OSS 120B (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel) in an LLM-as-a-Judge framework to filter out tasks referencing pre-existing codebases or modifications to extant files. This mitigation ensures that the models do not attempt modification operations within empty directories—a scenario that frequently results in redundant and exhausted tool invocations during failed execution cycles. The resulting dataset comprises roughly 15k tasks centered on direct solution synthesis. To further enhance the diversity of the generated outputs, we coupled each task with a supplementary markdown specification, equivalent to an AGENTS.md file. These documents impose additional constraints and architectural requirements, effectively narrowing the design space and necessitating more complex, varied solutions from the agent.
items.zh: 我们建立了一个基础种子任务集，旨在复制智能体式 CLI 中常见的用户发起操作。请参考图 13，我们讨论了完整流程。我们利用 NeMo Data Designer (nemo-data-designer) 生成了大约 20k 个查询，这些查询源自这些环境中通常执行的 24 种不同动作的分类。随后，我们在 LLM-as-a-Judge 框架中使用 GPT-OSS 120B (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel) 过滤掉引用现有代码库或修改现有文件的任务。这种缓解措施确保模型不会在空目录中尝试修改操作——这种情况在失败的执行周期中经常导致冗余和耗尽的工具调用。生成的数据集包含大约 15k 个专注于直接解决方案合成的任务。为了进一步增强生成输出的多样性，我们将每个任务与一个补充的 markdown 规范（相当于 AGENTS.md 文件）配对。这些文档施加了额外的约束和架构要求，有效地缩小了设计空间，并需要智能体提供更复杂、更多样化的解决方案。

items.en: Since we eliminate all tasks that require a pre-existing codebases, we augment this task set with roughly 3000 questions from SWE tasks that are challenging and come with pre-existing repository and specific git hash commit. We apply a simple prompt prior to the existing issue statements, stating that the execution environment does not have the library installed and therefore execution of unit tests should be avoided. This is a conscientious decision made to substantially reduce the engineering effort required to support per sample container based execution of each SWE task, reduce the number of tool calls and avoid large tool outputs due to multiple rounds of unit test executions. This further relaxes the constraints imposed on the agent to solve the issue, as there is no SWE specific prompt to guide the agent in solving the task. Finally, we synthesize 10k web development tasks using a taxonomy of 100 fine-grained tasks that are commonly requested by users as the seed, on which we apply LLM-as-a-Judge to eliminate tasks that require a pre-existing repository. We impose no restrictions on these tasks, but provide only a Node.js environment and expect the agent to setup and install all dependencies and plugins on its own.
items.zh: 由于我们排除了所有需要预先存在代码库的任务，我们通过从SWE任务中选取约3000个具有挑战性且附带现有代码库和特定git哈希提交的问题来扩充此任务集。我们在现有问题陈述之前应用一个简单的提示，说明执行环境没有安装该库，因此应避免执行单元测试。这是一个经过深思熟虑的决定，旨在大幅减少支持每个样本基于容器的SWE任务执行所需的工程工作量，减少工具调用次数，并避免因多轮单元测试执行而产生的大量工具输出。这进一步放宽了对智能体解决该问题的约束，因为没有特定于SWE的提示来指导智能体完成任务。最后，我们使用100个用户常请求的细粒度任务分类法作为种子，合成了10k个Web开发任务，并应用LLM作为评判者来排除需要预先存在代码库的任务。我们对这些任务不施加任何限制，仅提供一个Node.js环境，并期望智能体自行设置和安装所有依赖项和插件。

items.en: Applying these task sets, we distill from high-performance, open-source agentic LLMs such as Qwen-3-Coder-480B (qwen2025qwen25technicalreport) and Minimax M2.5 (minimax2025m2) by recording their interactions with various CLI environments, such as Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code CLI, and Stirrup. These interaction traces are subsequently filtered, normalized into the standard OpenAI message format with various tool definitions, and utilized for large-scale SFT to effectively embed agentic operational knowledge within the model. For each Agentic CLI, we study the individual capabilities that exist and are commonly utilized. We apply the same task sets to target different capabilities, such as Agent Skills, tool restriction (bash only execution), ask user clarifying questions, single and multi step planning, static and dynamic multi turn conversations and parallel tool calling, depending on whether the specific CLI can accommodate these capabilities.
items.zh: 应用这些任务集，我们从高性能开源智能体式LLM（如Qwen-3-Coder-480B和Minimax M2.5）中，通过记录它们与各种CLI环境（如Codex、OpenCode、Qwen Code CLI和Stirrup）的交互来进行蒸馏。这些交互轨迹随后被过滤、标准化为带有各种工具定义的OpenAI标准消息格式，并用于大规模SFT，以将智能体操作知识有效嵌入模型中。对于每个智能体式CLI，我们研究其存在且常用的个体能力。我们应用相同的任务集来针对不同能力，例如智能体技能、工具限制（仅bash执行）、向用户提问澄清问题、单步和多步规划、静态和动态多轮对话以及并行工具调用，具体取决于特定CLI是否支持这些能力。

items.en: Long Context. We extend the long-context SFT dataset from Nemotron 3 Nano with a more comprehensive synthetic data pipeline. To improve long-context multi-document reasoning, we construct a synthetic SFT dataset using long sequences from our pre-training blend, which contains books, papers, financial reports, code repositories, etc. We first cluster these documents by topic/domain and concatenate related documents to reach target sequence lengths, such as 128K, 256K, or 512K tokens. For each long-context sample, we use an LLM to generate one or more QA pairs. The prompt requires questions to involve cross-document or cross-section navigation, ensuring information is scattered rather than localized. It strictly enforces multi-hop reasoning, requiring at least 4 to 7 distinct retrieval or reasoning steps. These steps mandate computational or logical processing, preventing simple copy-pasting, and often include explicit formatting instructions. Next, we generate 8 independent reasoning traces for each context-question pair. We apply semantic majority voting to group the answers, either by exact match or via an LLM judge. From the resulting majority group, we select the answer containing the shortest reasoning trace. Additionally, we generate seven synthetic reasoning tasks to improve the model’s ability to process context in a sequential, left-to-right manner. Specifically, synthetic snippets (generated using Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507) are concatenated together to form long input context. The thinking traces are constructed by chaining rule-based reasoning steps, each of which includes relevant excerpts from the input context and tracking metadata, such as the frequency of query-related snippets. We also construct long-context samples by concatenating records from (nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-USA) to reach the required sequence length. Questions are designed to emphasize multi-hop reasoning and information aggregation across records. Context, question, and answer are formatted using pre-defined templates, with ground-truth answers derived by executing SQL queries over the underlying records.
items.zh: 长上下文。我们通过更全面的合成数据流水线，扩展了来自Nemotron 3 Nano的长上下文SFT数据集。为了改进长上下文多文档推理，我们使用预训练混合数据中的长序列构建了一个合成SFT数据集，其中包含书籍、论文、财务报告、代码库等。我们首先按主题/领域对这些文档进行聚类，并将相关文档连接起来以达到目标序列长度，例如128K、256K或512K个token。对于每个长上下文样本，我们使用LLM生成一个或多个QA对。提示要求问题涉及跨文档或跨章节导航，确保信息分散而非局部化。它严格强制多跳推理，要求至少4到7个不同的检索或推理步骤。这些步骤要求计算或逻辑处理，防止简单的复制粘贴，并且通常包含明确的格式指令。接下来，我们为每个上下文-问题对生成8个独立的推理轨迹。我们应用语义多数投票来对答案进行分组，通过精确匹配或LLM评判。从得到的多数组中，我们选择包含最短推理轨迹的答案。此外，我们生成七个合成推理任务，以提高模型以顺序、从左到右方式处理上下文的能力。具体来说，合成片段（使用Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507生成）被连接起来形成长输入上下文。思维轨迹通过链接基于规则的推理步骤构建，每个步骤包括输入上下文中的相关摘录和跟踪元数据，例如与查询相关片段的频率。我们还通过连接来自(nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-USA)的记录来构建长上下文样本，以达到所需的序列长度。问题设计强调跨记录的多跳推理和信息聚合。上下文、问题和答案使用预定义模板格式化，真实答案通过对底层记录执行SQL查询获得。

items.en: Financial Reasoning. To construct a large-scale training corpus for financial reasoning, we employ a template-based synthetic data generation (SDG) pipeline that scales a curated seed set into hundreds of thousands of grounded question–answer pairs. The pipeline sources 565 expert-authored seed questions from the SecQue benchmark (benyoash2025secque), a dataset of financial analysis questions anchored to SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings. These seeds are expanded combinatorially across S&P 500 companies888https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies, accessed 2025. and fiscal years (2019–2024), where comparative questions are restricted to company pairs within the same GICS Sub-Industry to preserve semantic coherence. GPT-OSS-120B paraphrases each template instantiation, producing up to three diverse reformulations per combination. The resulting questions are mapped to relevant SEC filing sections using the original SecQue metadata, and the corresponding documents are converted to markdown with a configurable token limit. For answer generation, we adopt the GenSelect strategy (toshniwal2025genselectgenerativeapproachbestofn): five candidate answers are sampled per question using GPT-OSS-120B with distinct random seeds, and a larger judge model (Qwen3-235B-A22B) selects the best response based on numerical accuracy, financial methodology, and logical soundness. A smaller model (Qwen3-30B-A3B) then classifies each pair as ANSWERABLE or UNANSWERABLE, retaining only those containing a complete, substantive response. Prior to supervised fine-tuning, the SDG output undergoes percentile-based outlier removal and deduplication. The resulting dataset comprises 366,243 financial Q&A pairs with reasoning traces.
items.zh: 金融推理。为了构建大规模的金融推理训练语料库，我们采用基于模板的合成数据生成流水线，将精选的种子集扩展到数十万个基于真实数据的问答对。该流水线从SecQue基准测试中获取565个专家编写的种子问题，该数据集包含基于SEC 10-K和10-Q文件的金融分析问题。这些种子在标普500公司和财年（2019-2024）上进行组合扩展，其中比较问题限制在同一GICS子行业内的公司对，以保持语义一致性。GPT-OSS-120B对每个模板实例进行释义，每个组合最多生成三种不同的改写。生成的问题使用原始SecQue元数据映射到相关的SEC文件部分，相应的文档转换为markdown格式，并带有可配置的token限制。对于答案生成，我们采用GenSelect策略：每个问题使用GPT-OSS-120B以不同的随机种子采样五个候选答案，然后一个更大的评判模型（Qwen3-235B-A22B）根据数值准确性、金融方法论和逻辑合理性选择最佳响应。然后，一个较小的模型（Qwen3-30B-A3B）将每个对分类为可回答或不可回答，仅保留包含完整、实质性响应的对。在监督微调之前，合成数据生成输出经过基于百分位数的异常值去除和去重。最终数据集包含366,243个带有推理轨迹的金融问答对。

items.en: CUDA. A large-scale synthetic CUDA dataset comprising 100K samples for kernel generation, repair, and optimization was constructed using a synthetic data generation pipeline based on DeepSeek-R1 and GPT-OSS-120B. Seed questions were sourced from popular open-source libraries, NVIDIA library API surfaces, and BackendBench (saroufim2025backendbench). These seeds were used to generate tuples of the form (PyTorch reference, CUDA C++ kernel) and (natural language specification, CUDA C++ kernel), each accompanied by reasoning. For each seed item, multiple candidate kernels were generated and rigorously validated for correctness within an internal CUDA evaluation environment. The validated kernels were then ranked by performance, and the highest-performing kernel was retained.
