In addition, we collected traces from an internal CUDA agent, producing samples of the form (PyTorch reference, faulty CUDA C++ kernel, error message, corrected CUDA C++ kernel) and (PyTorch reference, slow CUDA C++ kernel, Nsight Compute log, optimized CUDA C++ kernel). Using publicly available documentation and official code samples, and following the same formulation as the CUDA-C data, we generated additional PyTorch references and corresponding CUDA-library implementations with reasoning chains, as well as aligned natural language specifications. These libraries include Thrust, CUB, cuBLAS, cuDNN, cuSPARSE, cuRAND, and cuSOLVER.
items.zh: CUDA。使用基于DeepSeek-R1和GPT-OSS-120B的合成数据生成流水线，构建了一个包含100K样本的大规模合成CUDA数据集，用于内核生成、修复和优化。种子问题来自流行的开源库、NVIDIA库API接口和BackendBench。这些种子用于生成形式为（PyTorch参考，CUDA C++内核）和（自然语言规范，CUDA C++内核）的元组，每个元组都附有推理。对于每个种子项，生成多个候选内核，并在内部CUDA评估环境中严格验证其正确性。然后根据性能对验证过的内核进行排序，保留性能最高的内核。此外，我们从内部CUDA智能体收集轨迹，生成形式为（PyTorch参考，有错误的CUDA C++内核，错误消息，修正后的CUDA C++内核）和（PyTorch参考，慢速CUDA C++内核，Nsight Compute日志，优化后的CUDA C++内核）的样本。使用公开可用的文档和官方代码示例，并遵循与CUDA-C数据相同的公式，我们生成了额外的PyTorch参考和相应的CUDA库实现（带有推理链），以及对齐的自然语言规范。这些库包括Thrust、CUB、cuBLAS、cuDNN、cuSPARSE、cuRAND和cuSOLVER。

items.en: Safety. We have significantly enhanced our safety framework compared to Nemotron 3 Nano by combining a robust prompt library with a two-stage synthetic response generation strategy. While retaining the core prompts from Nemotron Content Safety v2 (ghosh-etal-2025-aegis2), Gretel Safety Alignment v1 (gretelai_gretel-safety-alignment-en-v1), Harmful Tasks (hasan2024pruning) and Red-Team-2K (luo2024jailbreakv_robustness) covering content safety and common jailbreak techniques, we added in new synthetic prompts targeting the elicitation of over-refusals, demographic biases, and copyright reproduction. We also expand coverage of jailbreak strategies to better capture emerging adversarial techniques including indirect prompt injection attacks.
items.zh: 安全性。与Nemotron 3 Nano相比，我们通过结合强大的提示库和两阶段合成响应生成策略，显著增强了安全框架。在保留来自Nemotron Content Safety v2、Gretel Safety Alignment v1、Harmful Tasks和Red-Team-2K的核心提示（涵盖内容安全和常见越狱技术）的同时，我们添加了新的合成提示，针对过度拒绝、人口统计偏见和版权复制的诱发。我们还扩展了越狱策略的覆盖范围，以更好地捕捉新兴的对抗性技术，包括间接提示注入攻击。

items.en: Our primary advancement over Nemotron 3 Nano is an explicit response policy framework. For each prompt, a response policy is inferred from a combination of prompt metadata, its annotated safety category, and predictions from a set of lightweight auxiliary classifiers that detect attributes such as self-harm risk, demographic targeting, or the presence of embedded adversarial instructions. We cast this decision process as a multi-class classification problem, where each class corresponds to a distinct response mode aligned with safety guidelines. These response modes specify whether the model should provide supportive resources such as helpline information, issue a refusal with a brief explanation, or answer the benign portion of the request while ignoring malicious content. This ensures that the responses are safe, contextually appropriate, and consistent across a diverse set of safety-sensitive scenarios.
items.zh: 我们对Nemotron 3 Nano的主要改进是一个明确的响应策略框架。对于每个提示，响应策略根据提示元数据、其注释的安全类别以及一组轻量级辅助分类器的预测来推断，这些分类器检测诸如自伤风险、人口统计目标或嵌入式对抗指令等属性。我们将此决策过程视为多类分类问题，其中每个类别对应于符合安全指南的不同响应模式。这些响应模式指定模型是否应提供支持性资源（如求助热线信息）、发出带有简短解释的拒绝，或回答请求中的良性部分而忽略恶意内容。这确保了响应是安全的、上下文适当的，并且在各种安全敏感场景中保持一致。

items.en: Following the deliberative alignment framework (guan2025deliberativealignmentreasoningenables), we adopt a two-stage generation process in which the reasoning trace and the final response are curated separately but consistently with our response policy. In the first stage, we construct a concise reasoning trace that guides the model to reflect on the safety properties of the prompt, explicitly identifying why the request may be unsafe or policy-relevant and what constraints should govern the response. In the second stage, we generate the final response based on this reasoning trace, ensuring that it adheres to the predefined response policy and behavior guidelines. This structured separation encourages deliberate reflection on safety guidelines while producing responses that are consistent, policy-compliant, and contextually appropriate to ensure that the final response follows safety policies while minimizing unnecessary references to said policies. Finally, we apply a content-moderation classifier to filter any responses flagged as unsafe, providing an additional safeguard to ensure alignment with safety objectives.
items.zh: 遵循审慎对齐框架，我们采用两阶段生成过程，其中推理轨迹和最终响应分别策划，但与我们的响应策略保持一致。在第一阶段，我们构建一个简洁的推理轨迹，引导模型反思提示的安全属性，明确识别请求可能不安全或与策略相关的原因，以及应约束响应的限制条件。在第二阶段，我们基于此推理轨迹生成最终响应，确保其遵守预定义的响应策略和行为指南。这种结构化分离鼓励对安全指南进行深思熟虑的反思，同时生成一致、符合策略且上下文适当的响应，以确保最终响应遵循安全策略，同时最小化对这些策略的不必要引用。最后，我们应用内容审核分类器过滤任何被标记为不安全的响应，提供额外的保障以确保与安全目标对齐。

items.en: Search. To improve search capabilities, we generated a synthetic search-agent SFT dataset using NeMo Data Designer (nemo-data-designer). The pipeline begins by constructing seed prompts grounded in the Wikidata knowledge graph (vrandecic2014wikidata): we query SPARQL (sparql2013) for well-connected hub entities across approximately 25 verified entity classes (cities, universities, films, chemical elements, etc.), then perform random walks of 4-8 hops through the graph, filtering out degenerate paths via stop-node lists, anti-meta-relation exclusions, and minimum path-length thresholds. Each valid walk yields a start entity, a chain of factual relations, and a final answer entity.
items.zh: 搜索。为了改进搜索能力，我们使用NeMo Data Designer生成了一个合成搜索智能体SFT数据集。该流水线首先基于Wikidata知识图谱构建种子提示：我们查询SPARQL以获取约25个经过验证的实体类别（城市、大学、电影、化学元素等）中连接良好的枢纽实体，然后通过图进行4-8跳的随机游走，通过停止节点列表、反元关系排除和最小路径长度阈值过滤退化路径。每个有效游走产生一个起始实体、一个事实关系链和一个最终答案实体。

items.en: Data Designer then processes these seeds in three stages: (1) a draft stage converts the structured knowledge-graph walk into a natural-language multi-hop question, (2) an obfuscation stage rewrites the question to hide intermediate entities and eliminate breadcrumb-style chaining – producing search-riddle queries where the solver must decompose the problem independently – and (3) an agent stage in which MiniMax-M2 (minimax2025m2) solves the obfuscated question by issuing web searches via the Tavily (https://tavily.com) MCP search tool, producing a grounded search trajectory with supporting URLs. Each resulting SFT record is a multi-turn conversation where assistant turns interleave chain-of-thought reasoning with structured tool calls, and tool-response turns return search results as JSON, preserving a full Thought–Action–Observation loop across an average of 12 tool calls per trajectory. A final structured-output stage normalizes the agent’s raw response into a validated JSON schema.
items.zh: 然后，Data Designer分三个阶段处理这些种子：（1）草稿阶段将结构化的知识图谱游走转换为自然语言的多跳问题，（2）混淆阶段重写问题以隐藏中间实体并消除面包屑式链接——产生搜索谜题查询，求解者必须独立分解问题，（3）智能体阶段，其中MiniMax-M2通过Tavily MCP搜索工具发出网络搜索来解决混淆问题，产生带有支持URL的基于搜索的轨迹。每个生成的SFT记录是一个多轮对话，其中助手轮次交错进行思维链推理和结构化工具调用，工具响应轮次以JSON格式返回搜索结果，在平均每个轨迹12次工具调用中保留完整的思考-行动-观察循环。最终的结构化输出阶段将智能体的原始响应规范化为经过验证的JSON模式。

items.en: Terminal Use. The dataset for enhancing terminal capabilities follows the dual-stream Terminal-Task-Gen methodology described in Nemotron-Terminal (pi2026dataengineeringscalingllm), comprising a total of 84,864 samples. This pipeline combines the adaptation of existing high-quality datasets with synthetic task generation grounded in a comprehensive terminal skill taxonomy. The source distribution consists of 68,924 synthetic samples, 8,125 samples from Nemotron-Cascade-Math, and 7,815 samples from Nemotron-Cascade-Code (wang2025nemotroncascadescalingcascadedreinforcement). For trajectory construction, we use DeepSeek-V3.2 (deepseekai2024deepseekv32) as the primary engine to generate step-by-step solution traces within isolated, Dockerized environments through an agentic execution-feedback loop. All samples are generated using the Terminus 2 agent framework (merrill2026terminalbenchbenchmarkingagentshard) as the underlying scaffolding, providing a unified set of terminal tools and a structured interaction protocol to maintain consistency and quality across long-horizon trajectories.
items.zh: 终端使用。用于增强终端能力的数据集遵循Nemotron-Terminal中描述的双流Terminal-Task-Gen方法论，共包含84,864个样本。该流水线结合了现有高质量数据集的适配和基于全面终端技能分类法的合成任务生成。源分布包括68,924个合成样本、8,125个来自Nemotron-Cascade-Math的样本和7,815个来自Nemotron-Cascade-Code的样本。对于轨迹构建，我们使用DeepSeek-V3.2作为主要引擎，在隔离的Docker化环境中通过智能体执行-反馈循环生成逐步解决方案轨迹。所有样本均使用Terminus 2智能体框架作为底层脚手架生成，提供统一的终端工具集和结构化交互协议，以在长程轨迹中保持一致性和质量。

items.en: Multilingual. Our multilingual data combines synthetic translations of English SFT examples with a sentence-level parallel corpus to improve machine translation. We reuse the line-by-line translation pipeline from Nemotron 3 Nano, translating into six languages (German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, and Chinese) using Qwen2.5-Instruct-14b. After translation, we apply filtering to remove samples in the wrong language and other common failure modes. We observed a recurring pattern where translation disrupts the alignment between prompt specifications and answer formats — a consistency usually maintained in English data. This mismatch led to instruction-following failures during preliminary testing. To mitigate this, we introduced a lightweight post-editing step with Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 to automatically restore format compliance. We also expand the parallel corpus with additional Chinese ↔\leftrightarrow English pairs and exclude very short samples that previously degraded post-training performance.
items.zh: 多语言。我们的多语言数据结合了英语SFT示例的合成翻译和句子级平行语料库，以改进机器翻译。我们重用Nemotron 3 Nano的逐行翻译流水线，使用Qwen2.5-Instruct-14b翻译成六种语言（德语、西班牙语、法语、意大利语、日语和中文）。翻译后，我们应用过滤以去除语言错误的样本和其他常见失败模式。我们观察到一种重复出现的模式，即翻译破坏了提示规范与答案格式之间的一致性——这种一致性通常在英语数据中得以保持。这种不匹配导致初步测试中指令遵循失败。为了缓解这一问题，我们引入了一个轻量级的后编辑步骤，使用Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507自动恢复格式合规性。我们还通过添加额外的中文↔英文对来扩展平行语料库，并排除了之前降低后训练性能的非常短的样本。

items.en: Structured Query Language (SQL). To improve Nemotron 3 Super on enterprise SQL workloads, we generate a synthetic text-to-SQL dataset with NeMo Data Designer (nemo-data-designer). The dataset contains 96.5k records spanning MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite across 60 industry sectors, ∼\sim700 domain topics, and 90 SQL concept buckets (from basic SELECT to recursive CTEs, window functions, and geospatial queries). Each sample pairs a natural-language prompt and a fully synthetic database schema context with a target SQL query. To improve robustness and to mimic the real-world messiness of production databases, the pipeline injects distractor tables and columns into the database context. Specifically, related but irrelevant tables and columns are added to the database context, forcing the model to learn to ignore irrelevant schema elements. Prompt diversity is controlled along three axes – instruction style (imperative, declarative, interrogative, contextual, abbreviated), linguistic register (formal, conversational, technical, academic, direct), and politeness level – yielding naturalistic and varied user requests. The final dataset of 96.5k records is validated and filtered down by Data Designer from a larger dataset using per-dialect syntax validators and five LLM-as-a-critic judges.
items.zh: 结构化查询语言（SQL）。为了改进Nemotron 3 Super在企业SQL工作负载上的表现，我们使用NeMo Data Designer生成了一个合成文本到SQL数据集。该数据集包含96.5k条记录，涵盖MySQL、PostgreSQL和SQLite，跨越60个行业领域、约700个领域主题和90个SQL概念桶（从基本的SELECT到递归CTE、窗口函数和地理空间查询）。每个样本将一个自然语言提示和完全合成的数据库模式上下文与目标SQL查询配对。为了提高鲁棒性并模拟生产数据库的真实混乱性，流水线向数据库上下文中注入干扰表和列。具体来说，相关但不相关的表和列被添加到数据库上下文中，迫使模型学会忽略不相关的模式元素。提示多样性沿三个轴控制——指令风格（命令式、陈述式、疑问式、上下文式、缩写式）、语言语域（正式、会话式、技术性、学术性、直接性）和礼貌程度——产生自然且多样的用户请求。最终的96.5k条记录数据集由Data Designer通过使用每种方言的语法验证器和五个LLM作为评判者，从更大的数据集中验证和过滤得到。

items.en: Conversational Tool Use. Large-scale specialized tool-use training data has been adopted by many models to boost agentic capabilities (Liu2024ToolACE; deepseekai2024deepseekv32; kimiteam2025kimik2openagentic; 5team2025glm45agenticreasoningcoding). For Nemotron 3 Super, we scale conversational tool-use data via a fully synthetic, six-stage generation pipeline:
items.zh: 对话式工具使用。大规模专用工具使用训练数据已被许多模型采用以提升智能体能力。对于Nemotron 3 Super，我们通过一个完全合成的六阶段生成流水线来扩展对话式工具使用数据：

items.en: Domain Generation: Sample synthetic domains with a model, iteratively expanding initial generations into specialized subdomains.
items.zh: 领域生成：使用模型采样合成领域，迭代地将初始生成扩展到专门的子领域。

items.en: Policy and Tool Generation: Sample customer-service policies and related tools, iteratively improving them via self-refinement; use few-shot prompting and an LM-as-a-Judge for quality filtering to maintain style and formatting.
items.zh: 策略和工具生成：采样客户服务策略和相关工具，通过自我改进迭代优化；使用少样本提示和LM作为评判者进行质量过滤以保持风格和格式。

items.en: Scenario Generation: Generate plausible user personas, background information, and inquiries for each policy setting.
items.zh: 场景生成：为每个策略设置生成合理的用户画像、背景信息和查询。

items.en: Trajectory Collection: For each policy–scenario pair, simulate 1616 customer service interactions among a model-based agent, user, and environment.
items.zh: 轨迹收集：对于每个策略-场景对，在基于模型的智能体、用户和环境之间模拟16次客户服务交互。

items.en: Verification: Evaluate trajectories at both outcome and process levels using an LM-as-a-Judge.
items.zh: 验证：使用LM作为评判者，在结果和过程层面评估轨迹。

items.en: SFT Data Selection: Select successful trajectories for SFT and filter for difficulty by dropping scenarios that yield all-success or all-failure outcomes.
items.zh: SFT数据选择：选择成功的轨迹用于SFT，并通过丢弃导致全成功或全失败结果的场景来过滤难度。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Overview of the synthetic data generation pipeline for specialized conversational tool-use SFT data used for Nemotron 3 Super.
items.capZh: 图14：用于 Nemotron 3 Super 的专业化对话式工具使用 SFT 数据的合成数据生成流水线概览。

items.en: A visualization of the pipeline is shown in Figure 14. We utilize Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507, Qwen3-32B, Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 (yang2025qwen3technicalreport), deepseek-r1-0528 (deepseekai2025deepseekr1incentivizingreasoningcapability), DeepSeek-V3.2 (deepseekai2024deepseekv32), and gpt-oss-120b (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel) on various parts of the above pipeline, yielding 279,116 conversations across 838 domains. This represents a substantial scale-up over Nemotron 3 Nano, which used 15,588 conversations spanning 5 domains.
items.zh: 该流水线的可视化如图14所示。我们在上述流水线的不同部分使用了 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507、Qwen3-32B、Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 (yang2025qwen3technicalreport)、deepseek-r1-0528 (deepseekai2025deepseekr1incentivizingreasoningcapability)、DeepSeek-V3.2 (deepseekai2024deepseekv32) 和 gpt-oss-120b (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel)，生成了涵盖 838 个领域的 279,116 条对话。这相对于 Nemotron 3 Nano 有了显著扩展，后者仅使用了涵盖 5 个领域的 15,588 条对话。

items.en: General-Purpose Tool Use. The broader, general purpose tool-calling synthetic data pipeline begins with the construction of diverse tool sets from ToolEyes (ToolEyes2025), API-Bank (APIBank2023), UltraTools (Huang2024UltraTool), AutoTools (Shi2025AutoTools), xLAM (Zhang2024xLAM), Glaive-Function-Calling-v2 (GlaiveFunctionCallingV22025), Toucan-1.5M (Xu2025Toucan), as well as custom written tools that serve as the foundation for downstream synthetic task generation. A tool-calling trajectory is simulated by grounding in one or multiple of these tool sets. The trajectory simulation involves an LLM playing three roles - User (User-LLM), Assistant (Assistant-LLM), and Tool Environment (Tool-LLM). The User-LLM is seeded with the selected tool set, a persona sampled from Nemotron-Personas-USA (nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-USA), and a tool-calling scenario (single-turn, multi-turn, or multi-step). The User-LLM starts by designing a task guided by the tool-calling scenario which is relevant to the selected persona and can be solved by the selected tool set. The Assistant-LLM attempts to solve this task in one or more turns by producing tool-calls and responding to tool execution results. The Tool-LLM is responsible for producing a simulated tool execution result based on the tool-call generated by the Assistant-LLM and the tool being called. The Tool-LLM is prompted with a rubric that helps identify syntactic and semantic errors in tool-calling, as well as the original user query so that the tool results can be contextualized when tool-call is successful. To ensure accuracy, we employ a turn-level and trajectory-level judge similar to the specialized tool-calling data generation. The turn level judge is also paired with a rule-based verification for ensuring correctness of tool-calls. We scale this pipeline with DeepSeek-v3.2 (DeepSeekV32025) and GLM-4.7 (GLM47Zai2025) to create a dataset of 1.5M diverse tool-calling trajectories.
items.zh: 通用工具使用。更广泛的通用工具调用合成数据流水线始于从 ToolEyes (ToolEyes2025)、API-Bank (APIBank2023)、UltraTools (Huang2024UltraTool)、AutoTools (Shi2025AutoTools)、xLAM (Zhang2024xLAM)、Glaive-Function-Calling-v2 (GlaiveFunctionCallingV22025)、Toucan-1.5M (Xu2025Toucan) 以及自定义编写的工具中构建多样化的工具集，这些工具集作为下游合成任务生成的基础。通过基于一个或多个工具集来模拟工具调用轨迹。轨迹模拟涉及一个 LLM 扮演三个角色——用户（User-LLM）、助手（Assistant-LLM）和工具环境（Tool-LLM）。User-LLM 以选定的工具集、从 Nemotron-Personas-USA (nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-USA) 中采样的人物角色以及一个工具调用场景（单轮、多轮或多步）作为种子。User-LLM 首先根据工具调用场景设计一个任务，该任务与所选人物角色相关，并且可以通过所选工具集解决。Assistant-LLM 尝试通过生成工具调用并响应工具执行结果来在一轮或多轮中解决此任务。Tool-LLM 负责根据 Assistant-LLM 生成的工具调用和被调用的工具生成模拟的工具执行结果。Tool-LLM 被提示一个评分标准，该标准有助于识别工具调用中的语法和语义错误，以及原始用户查询，以便在工具调用成功时能够将工具结果置于上下文中。为确保准确性，我们采用了类似于专业化工具调用数据生成的轮级和轨迹级评判器。轮级评判器还与基于规则的验证配对，以确保工具调用的正确性。我们使用 DeepSeek-v3.2 (DeepSeekV32025) 和 GLM-4.7 (GLM47Zai2025) 扩展此流水线，创建了一个包含 150 万条多样化工具调用轨迹的数据集。

items.en: The overall general-purpose synthetic tool-calling data pipeline is visualized in figure 15.
items.zh: 通用合成工具调用数据流水线的整体可视化如图15所示。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Overview of the pipeline for general-purpose tool-calling data used in Nemotron 3 Super.
items.capZh: 图15：用于 Nemotron 3 Super 的通用工具调用数据流水线概览。

items.en: Our general stage 1 SFT data blend can be found in Figure 16 (all datasets not listed make up less than 1% of the blend). We train on over 7M total samples. In stage 2, we use 85% of the stage 1 blend and augments it with 256K and 512K-token long-context data. Compared to Nemotron 3 Nano, we significantly increased the volume and diversity of agentic tasks, and allocate it a much larger proportion of our blend.
items.zh: 我们的一般阶段1 SFT 数据混合如图16所示（未列出的所有数据集在混合中占比不到1%）。我们总共训练了超过 700 万个样本。在阶段2中，我们使用了阶段1混合的85%，并增加了 256K 和 512K 令牌的长上下文数据。与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相比，我们显著增加了智能体式任务的数量和多样性，并在混合中为其分配了更大的比例。

items.capEn: Figure 16: SFT data blend for Nemotron 3 Super.
items.capZh: 图16：Nemotron 3 Super 的 SFT 数据混合。

items.en: Nemotron 3 Super is trained for three reasoning modes: reasoning-off, regular and low-effort. The low-effort reasoning mode is a new addition. The regular and low-effort reasoning modes have the option to be used in conjunction with inference-time budget control (nvidia2025nemotronhfamilyaccurateefficient). These combinations of controls provide flexibilities that cover the entire spectrum of accuracy-efficiency trade-off to meet customers’ needs in various application scenarios.
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 针对三种推理模式进行训练：推理关闭、常规和低努力。低努力推理模式是新增加的。常规和低努力推理模式可以选择与推理时预算控制结合使用 (nvidia2025nemotronhfamilyaccurateefficient)。这些控制组合提供了覆盖准确率-效率权衡整个范围的灵活性，以满足客户在各种应用场景中的需求。

items.en: The low-effort reasoning mode is introduced during the SFT stage by adding training samples generated by GPT-OSS-120B in its low-effort mode (du2025nemotron). These low-effort training samples cover the tasks of math reasoning, STEM question answering and instruction following, and represent 2% of the overall SFT data by sample count. The low-effort mode is later optimized during the RL stages to be discussed in the next section.
items.zh: 低努力推理模式在 SFT 阶段通过添加由 GPT-OSS-120B 在其低努力模式下生成的训练样本 (du2025nemotron) 引入。这些低努力训练样本涵盖数学推理、STEM 问答和指令遵循任务，按样本计数占整体 SFT 数据的 2%。低努力模式随后在 RL 阶段进行优化，这将在下一节讨论。

items.en: The SFT recipe for reasoning-off mode and for inference-time budget control is similar to nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen with a few differences. We strip the reasoning traces from a random 3% samples for reasoning-off mode. After the main SFT stage, we add a short semi-on-policy SFT stage of 350 steps for inference-time budget control, where we collect roll-outs from the model and truncate 12% of reasoning traces to random reasoning budgets.
items.zh: 推理关闭模式和推理时预算控制的 SFT 配方与 nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen 类似，但有一些差异。我们随机从 3% 的样本中剥离推理轨迹用于推理关闭模式。在主 SFT 阶段之后，我们增加了一个简短的半在线 SFT 阶段，共 350 步，用于推理时预算控制，在此阶段我们从模型中收集 rollout，并将 12% 的推理轨迹截断为随机推理预算。

items.en: The RL phase of Nemotron 3 Super post-training consists of three stages followed by an MTP healing stage as shown in Figure 12:
items.zh: Nemotron 3 Super 后训练的 RL 阶段包括三个阶段，随后是一个 MTP 修复阶段，如图12所示：

items.en: — Stage 1: Multi-environment RL from Verifiable Rewards (§3.2.1). This is the primary training stage, where we optimize Nemotron 3 Super jointly across the full set of environments. Training in a unified mixture keeps each RL update informed by the complete environment distribution and helps prevent regressions on individual tasks over the course of training.
items.zh: — 阶段1：来自可验证奖励的多环境 RL（§3.2.1）。这是主要的训练阶段，我们在整个环境集合上联合优化 Nemotron 3 Super。在统一混合中训练使得每次 RL 更新都能从完整的环境分布中获取信息，并有助于防止在训练过程中个别任务上的性能下降。

items.en: — Stage 2: SWE-RL for end-to-end software engineering tasks (§3.2.2). We run SWE-RL as a separate stage because SWE rollouts are substantially slower to generate and typically require longer context lengths, creating a throughput bottleneck when co-trained with shorter-horizon environments. Isolating this stage allows us to tune rollout and batching settings for long-horizon, long-context trajectories.
items.zh: — 阶段2：用于端到端软件工程任务的 SWE-RL（§3.2.2）。我们将 SWE-RL 作为一个独立阶段运行，因为 SWE rollout 的生成速度要慢得多，并且通常需要更长的上下文长度，当与较短周期的环境共同训练时会造成吞吐量瓶颈。隔离此阶段允许我们为长周期、长上下文轨迹调整 rollout 和批处理设置。

items.en: — Stage 3: RLHF (§3.2.3). We finally apply RLHF as a distinct stage to improve instruction-following behavior, robustness, and overall interaction quality.
items.zh: — 阶段3：基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）（§3.2.3）。我们最后将 RLHF 作为一个独立阶段应用，以改进指令遵循行为、鲁棒性和整体交互质量。

items.en: — Stage 4: MTP Healing. In this stage we train the MTP heads and keep rest of the weights frozen. We re-use the prompts from RLVR, and train the MTP head using the negative log likelihood loss similar to SFT on the generated responses. We find this stage significantly improves MTP accuracy.
items.zh: — 阶段4：MTP 修复。在此阶段，我们训练 MTP 头并保持其余权重冻结。我们重用来自 RLVR 的提示，并使用类似于 SFT 的负对数似然损失在生成的响应上训练 MTP 头。我们发现此阶段显著提高了 MTP 准确率。

items.en: We describe these stages below including the training algorithm, data and systems setup.
items.zh: 我们在下面描述这些阶段，包括训练算法、数据和系统设置。

items.en: We employ a unified RLVR strategy similar to Nemotron 3 Nano, but significantly scale the number of environments. We find that training on all environments simultaneously yields stable gains, whereas single-environment training leads to severe regressions on other benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们采用类似于 Nemotron 3 Nano 的统一 RLVR 策略，但显著扩展了环境数量。我们发现同时在所有环境上训练能带来稳定的收益，而单环境训练会导致在其他基准测试上严重退化。

items.en: Our RLVR setting contains 21 environments covering diverse domains, including math, code, STEM, safety, chat, instruction following, long context capabilities, puzzles, and various agentic tasks. For data mixture and curriculum, we adopt an approach similar to Nemotron 3 Nano: we filter out prompts where the SFT model consistently provides correct answers, then sort the remaining samples via a difficulty-based curriculum. Further details of this methodology are available in Nemotron 3 Nano.
items.zh: 我们的 RLVR 设置包含 21 个环境，涵盖多个领域，包括数学、代码、STEM、安全、聊天、指令遵循、长上下文能力、谜题和各种智能体式任务。对于数据混合和课程，我们采用类似于 Nemotron 3 Nano 的方法：我们过滤掉 SFT 模型始终提供正确答案的提示，然后通过基于难度的课程对剩余样本进行排序。该方法的更多细节可在 Nemotron 3 Nano 中找到。

items.en: During the multi-environmental RL stages, we convert a subset of the prompts to be in the low-effort mode. For each low-effort prompt, the reward for a roll-out is adjusted as a function of both correctness and the number of generated tokens. The low-effort prompt mix starts with subsets of Math, STEM QA and competitive coding prompts, in total representing 2% of all RL prompts being in low-effort mode, and is later reduced to subsets of Math and STEM QA, representing just 1% of RL prompts. For Math and STEM QA, we randomly sample a subset. For competitive coding, we have a set of coding problems that have been withheld from SFT data and we only sample from this withheld set for low-effort coding prompts. Empirical results suggest that this data strategy provides sufficient generalization and the low-effort mode is improved across a wide set of benchmarks during the course of multi-environmental RL.
items.zh: 在多环境 RL 阶段，我们将一部分提示转换为低努力模式。对于每个低努力提示，rollout 的奖励根据正确性和生成的令牌数量进行调整。低努力提示混合从数学、STEM QA 和竞赛编程提示的子集开始，总共占所有 RL 提示的 2% 处于低努力模式，随后减少到数学和 STEM QA 的子集，仅占 RL 提示的 1%。对于数学和 STEM QA，我们随机采样一个子集。对于竞赛编程，我们有一组从 SFT 数据中保留的编程问题，并且仅从这组保留的问题中采样用于低努力编程提示。实证结果表明，这种数据策略提供了足够的泛化能力，并且在多环境 RL 过程中，低努力模式在广泛的基准测试上得到了改进。

items.en: We scale up our RL data significantly compared to Nemotron 3 Nano. We describe the RL datasets we used in our multi environment RL below. The majority of the RL training environments are open sourced in Nemo Gym (nemo-gym). In total, we train on 21 environments and 37 different RL datasets.
items.zh: 与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相比，我们显著扩展了 RL 数据。下面描述我们在多环境 RL 中使用的 RL 数据集。大多数 RL 训练环境在 Nemo Gym (nemo-gym) 中开源。我们总共在 21 个环境和 37 个不同的 RL 数据集上训练。

items.en: — Math. We use the same competitive math problems as Nemotron 3 Nano. For this dataset, we train both with and without a Python execution tool. We also introduce a new environment for formal proof verification.
items.zh: — 数学。我们使用与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相同的竞赛数学题。对于该数据集，我们分别在有和没有 Python 执行工具的情况下进行训练。我们还引入了一个新的形式化证明验证环境。

items.en: — Code. We train on competition-style code data from Nemotron 3 Nano and wang2025nemotroncascadescalingcascadedreinforcement. We also train on single-step patch generation for software engineering tasks to prepare for end-to-end RL in the next stage.
items.zh: — 代码。我们使用来自 Nemotron 3 Nano 和 wang2025nemotroncascadescalingcascadedreinforcement 的竞赛风格代码数据进行训练。我们还针对软件工程任务训练单步补丁生成，为下一阶段的端到端强化学习做准备。

items.en: — STEM. We include the STEM datasets from Nemotron 3 Nano and add newly curated, more challenging scientific problems.
items.zh: — STEM。我们包含来自 Nemotron 3 Nano 的 STEM 数据集，并新增了精心策划的更具挑战性的科学问题。

items.en: — Instruction Following. We augment the instruction-following data from Nemotron 3 Nano with a new multi-challenge dataset. In this setting, the agent must follow complex user instructions, with rewards computed from a predetermined rubric.
items.zh: — 指令遵循。我们使用新的多挑战数据集扩充了 Nemotron 3 Nano 的指令遵循数据。在此设置中，智能体必须遵循复杂的用户指令，奖励根据预定的评分标准计算。

items.en: — Safety. We add two environments: one targeting reduced over-refusals on safety-related prompts, and one improving robustness to jailbreaks. For jailbreaks, seed prompts come from our SFT data; to surface harder attacks during RL, we apply an iterative attack pipeline following PAIR (chao2024jailbreakingblackboxlarge), attacking an early SFT-only checkpoint and collecting modified prompts with high attack success rates.
items.zh: — 安全。我们添加了两个环境：一个旨在减少对安全相关提示的过度拒绝，另一个旨在提高对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。对于越狱攻击，种子提示来自我们的 SFT 数据；为了在强化学习期间暴露更难的攻击，我们遵循 PAIR（chao2024jailbreakingblackboxlarge）应用迭代攻击流程，攻击早期的仅 SFT 检查点，并收集具有高攻击成功率的修改后提示。

items.en: — Long Context. We use the same long-context environment introduced in Nemotron 3 Nano.
items.zh: — 长上下文。我们使用与 Nemotron 3 Nano 相同的长上下文环境。

items.en: — Agentic Tool Use. Beyond the tool-use environments from Nemotron 3 Nano, we add new environments focused on conversational tool use and terminal use.
items.zh: — 智能体式工具使用。除了 Nemotron 3 Nano 中的工具使用环境外，我们还新增了专注于对话式工具使用和终端使用的环境。

items.en: — Reasoning Gym. We train with Reasoning Gym (stojanovski2025reasoning), enabling learning over a diverse suite of reasoning tasks.
items.zh: — 推理健身房。我们使用推理健身房（stojanovski2025reasoning）进行训练，从而能够在多样化的推理任务套件上进行学习。

items.en: In the SWE-RL stage, we improve the model’s ability to autonomously solve GitHub issues under diverse harnesses. Each rollout launches an Apptainer container with the target repository, runs an OpenHands agent loop to produce a code patch, and evaluates it against ground-truth tests for a binary reward. For tool diversity, we implemented OpenCode and Codex agent classes within OpenHands that match the tool formats of Claude Code and Codex CLI, reusing a single harness while varying tools and prompts at training time. This multi-harness training improves the model’s generalization and performance across all target harnesses at inference time.
items.zh: 在 SWE-RL 阶段，我们提高了模型在多种框架下自主解决 GitHub 问题的能力。每次 rollout 启动一个包含目标仓库的 Apptainer 容器，运行 OpenHands 智能体循环以生成代码补丁，并根据真实测试评估补丁以获得二元奖励。为了实现工具多样性，我们在 OpenHands 中实现了 OpenCode 和 Codex 智能体类，它们匹配 Claude Code 和 Codex CLI 的工具格式，在训练时重用单个框架同时改变工具和提示。这种多框架训练提高了模型在推理时对所有目标框架的泛化能力和性能。

items.en: We follow a similar approach to Nemotron 3 Nano for RLHF, training a large GenRM model to provide supervision during RL. Rather than using a vanilla GenRM, we train a principle following GenRM as in wang2025rlbff. These principles allow us to guide Nemotron 3 Super’s behavior on important domains like identity and safety related topics. Similar to Nemotron 3 Nano, we use Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 as the initialization for training the GenRM.
items.zh: 我们遵循与 Nemotron 3 Nano 类似的方法进行基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），训练一个大型 GenRM 模型以在强化学习期间提供监督。我们没有使用普通的 GenRM，而是像 wang2025rlbff 中那样训练了一个遵循原则的 GenRM。这些原则使我们能够指导 Nemotron 3 Super 在重要领域（如身份和安全相关主题）上的行为。与 Nemotron 3 Nano 类似，我们使用 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 作为训练 GenRM 的初始化。

items.en: To train the GenRM we use the Helpsteer 3 dataset (Wang2025HelpSteer3Preference), commercially friendly subsets of the lmarena-140k dataset (chiang2024chatbot), and some more recently collected human preference data. Unlike Nemotron 3 Nano, we train using our GenRM throughout our multi environment RL stage and also perform a separate RLHF-only stage at the end of post training.
items.zh: 为了训练 GenRM，我们使用了 Helpsteer 3 数据集（Wang2025HelpSteer3Preference）、lmarena-140k 数据集（chiang2024chatbot）的商业友好子集，以及一些最近收集的人类偏好数据。与 Nemotron 3 Nano 不同，我们在整个多环境强化学习阶段使用我们的 GenRM 进行训练，并在后训练结束时执行一个单独的仅 RLHF 阶段。

items.en: We use an asynchronous GRPO setup in which training and inference are decoupled across separate GPU devices. Inference workers continuously generate trajectories, which are stored in a rollout buffer. Once enough trajectories are collected to form a batch, the batch is sent to the training engine for a model update. We push the updated weights to the inference workers as soon as a new model version is available. Because weight updates can happen mid-rollout, a single trajectory may contain tokens produced by different model versions. We do not recompute the KV cache after updating the model weights on the inference workers. To avoid excessive policy lag, which may result in accuracy degradation, we restrict the inference workers to be at most one step behind the latest model version.
items.zh: 我们使用异步 GRPO 设置，其中训练和推理在单独的 GPU 设备上解耦。推理工作器持续生成轨迹，这些轨迹存储在 rollout 缓冲区中。一旦收集到足够形成批次的轨迹，该批次就会被发送到训练引擎进行模型更新。一旦新模型版本可用，我们立即将更新后的权重推送到推理工作器。由于权重更新可能发生在 rollout 中途，单个轨迹可能包含由不同模型版本生成的 token。在更新推理工作器上的模型权重后，我们不重新计算 KV 缓存。为了避免过度的策略滞后（可能导致精度下降），我们将推理工作器限制为最多落后最新模型版本一步。

items.en: To stabilize the training and minimize off-policy effects caused by the training-inference mismatch and policy lag, we mask the importance sampling ratio computed from the training and inference logprobs (Shao2024DeepSeekMath; team2025every; yao2025offpolicy).
items.zh: 为了稳定训练并最小化由训练-推理不匹配和策略滞后引起的离策略效应，我们屏蔽了根据训练和推理对数概率计算的重要性采样比率（Shao2024DeepSeekMath; team2025every; yao2025offpolicy）。

items.en: In multi-environment RLVR, we sample 256 prompts per step and generate 16 responses per prompt. We train with a batch size of 4096, which corresponds to a single gradient update per rollout. We begin training with a maximum generation length of 49K tokens and later increase it to 64K.
items.zh: 在多环境 RLVR 中，我们每步采样 256 个提示，并为每个提示生成 16 个响应。我们使用 4096 的批次大小进行训练，这对应于每次 rollout 进行一次梯度更新。我们以最大生成长度 49K token 开始训练，后来增加到 64K。

items.en: Agentic RL - PivotRL: Post-training for long-horizon agentic capabilities has a tension between efficiency and accuracy. By long-horizon, we mean tasks that require many turns of interaction with an environment, such as conversational tool use, code editing, terminal interaction, and web search. SFT is cheap and simple for this task, but it often degrades performance outside of the target domain (OOD). End-to-end RL avoids that outcome to a large part, but it is costly because every update requires online interactive rollouts in complex environments. To address this, during the post-training of Super, we adopt PivotRL (yi2026pivotrl).
items.zh: 智能体式强化学习 - PivotRL：针对长周期智能体能力的后训练在效率和准确性之间存在矛盾。所谓长周期，是指需要与环境进行多轮交互的任务，例如对话式工具使用、代码编辑、终端交互和网络搜索。SFT 对于此任务廉价且简单，但通常会降低目标领域外（OOD）的性能。端到端强化学习在很大程度上避免了这种结果，但成本高昂，因为每次更新都需要在复杂环境中进行在线交互式 rollout。为了解决这个问题，在 Super 的后训练期间，我们采用了 PivotRL（yi2026pivotrl）。

items.en: PivotRL is an assistant-turn-level RL method that addresses this tradeoff by reusing offline SFT expert trajectories during RL. It focuses training on informative turns (called "pivots") within those SFT traces, where the policy has uncertainty over the next action, and it uses a domain-appropriate reward to match the policy’s action to the expert action, so the model gets credit for similar actions rather than the exact expert action. We notice that this method greatly improves the efficiency of our agentic RL, without facing the OOD degradation issues of SFT.
items.zh: PivotRL 是一种助手轮次级别的强化学习方法，通过在强化学习期间重用离线 SFT 专家轨迹来解决这种权衡。它将训练集中在这些 SFT 轨迹中信息丰富的轮次（称为“枢轴”）上，在这些轮次中策略对下一个动作存在不确定性，并使用领域适当的奖励将策略的动作与专家动作匹配，从而使模型因相似动作（而非精确的专家动作）而获得奖励。我们注意到，这种方法大大提高了我们智能体式强化学习的效率，而不会遇到 SFT 的 OOD 退化问题。

items.en: We apply PivotRL for all agentic domains: including for Agentic Programming, Search, Terminal Use, and Conversational Tool Use. We will have a manuscript with more details soon.
items.zh: 我们将 PivotRL 应用于所有智能体领域：包括智能体式编程、搜索、终端使用和对话式工具使用。我们很快将发布一篇包含更多细节的论文。

items.en: RL at the frontier of model post-training is currently defined by scaling up to an increasing diversity of tasks or environments designed for the model to learn increasingly general capabilities. Scaling RL to many environments requires a high-performance, extensible, and standardized interface for coordinating between rollouts and training. To address the scaling performance and extensibility challenges using one standard framework, we adopt NeMo Gym (nemo-gym) and NeMo RL (nemo-rl) for enabling large-scale RL on many different environments/verifiers.
items.zh: 当前模型后训练前沿的强化学习是通过扩展到越来越多的任务或环境来定义的，这些任务或环境旨在让模型学习越来越通用的能力。将强化学习扩展到许多环境需要一个高性能、可扩展且标准化的接口来协调 rollout 和训练。为了解决使用一个标准框架时的扩展性能和可扩展性挑战，我们采用 NeMo Gym（nemo-gym）和 NeMo RL（nemo-rl）来实现在许多不同环境/验证器上的大规模强化学习。

items.en: NeMo Gym is based on the abstraction of servers. There are three core varieties of servers in Gym: (1) agents, (2) models, and (3) resources. An agent server implements the rollout kernel of a RL environment. A model server wraps an inference engine such as vLLM (kwon2023efficientmemorymanagementlarge) to provide a prompt-response API, and also carefully preserves token and inference log-prob data and metadata required for RL. A resource server provides a verification API for computing rewards from a given rollout.
items.zh: NeMo Gym 基于服务器的抽象。Gym 中有三种核心服务器类型：（1）智能体，（2）模型，（3）资源。智能体服务器实现强化学习环境的 rollout 内核。模型服务器封装推理引擎（如 vLLM（kwon2023efficientmemorymanagementlarge））以提供提示-响应 API，并仔细保留强化学习所需的 token 和推理对数概率数据及元数据。资源服务器提供验证 API，用于从给定的 rollout 计算奖励。

items.en: Our Nemotron Super 3 RLVR experiments were all based on an integrated infrastructure of NeMo RL and NeMo Gym: NeMo RL acts as the RL training loop controller, using Megatron-Core (shoeybi2020megatronlmtrainingmultibillionparameter) for model training at scale, and routing all rollouts through NeMo Gym and vLLM.
items.zh: 我们的 Nemotron Super 3 RLVR 实验均基于 NeMo RL 和 NeMo Gym 的集成基础设施：NeMo RL 充当强化学习训练循环控制器，使用 Megatron-Core（shoeybi2020megatronlmtrainingmultibillionparameter）进行大规模模型训练，并通过 NeMo Gym 和 vLLM 路由所有 rollout。

items.en: NeMo RL and NeMo Gym use ray for orchestration and resource management and deploy the ray cluster on SLURM. Megatron training workers, vLLM generation workers, Gym environments and judge models are all scheduled onto a single ray cluster.
items.zh: NeMo RL和NeMo Gym使用ray进行编排和资源管理，并在SLURM上部署ray集群。Megatron训练工作节点、vLLM生成工作节点、Gym环境和评判模型都被调度到单个ray集群上。

items.en: Async RL Infrastructure: All RL stages used asynchronous RL, where generation can happen independently of training which improves training efficiency by trading off how on-policy the rollouts are. The trainings used one-step off policy where each training step was earmarked for a future training step so there were no wasted rollouts. Training and generation were not collocated which simplifies deployment and avoids having to orchestrate complex memory management between the async training and generation workers.
items.zh: 异步RL基础设施：所有RL阶段都使用异步RL，其中生成可以独立于训练进行，通过权衡rollout的on-policy程度来提高训练效率。训练使用一步off-policy，每个训练步骤都预留给未来的训练步骤，因此没有浪费的rollout。训练和生成不共置，这简化了部署，避免了在异步训练和生成工作节点之间编排复杂的内存管理。

items.en: All asynchronous RL runs also used in-flight weight updates (piche2025pipelinerl) where training can update generation worker weights without waiting for the remaining ongoing rollouts to finish. The result is a single rollout can have tokens and log probabilities from differently aged policies. Enabling in-flight weight updates is critical for speeding up asynchronous RL training. We did not recompute the KV cache after in-flight weight updates.
items.zh: 所有异步RL运行还使用了飞行中权重更新（piche2025pipelinerl），其中训练可以在不等待剩余正在进行的rollout完成的情况下更新生成工作节点的权重。结果是单个rollout可以包含来自不同时期策略的token和对数概率。启用飞行中权重更新对于加速异步RL训练至关重要。我们在飞行中权重更新后没有重新计算KV缓存。

items.en: Resiliency: As we scaled up to 1k GPUs, we encountered several issues that caused intermittent failures that were not observed in smaller job shapes. These issues fell into two categories (1) hardware related and (2) software related.
items.zh: 弹性：当我们扩展到1k GPU时，我们遇到了几个导致间歇性故障的问题，这些问题在较小的作业规模中没有观察到。这些问题分为两类：（1）硬件相关和（2）软件相关。

items.en: We observed several hardware issues that required full restart of the job, so several optimizations were also made to improve startup time by (1) parallelizing all initialization (2) prefetching all virtual environments and binaries (3) utilize caching in upstream repos like vLLM and flashinfer.
items.zh: 我们观察到几个硬件问题需要完全重启作业，因此还进行了几项优化以缩短启动时间，方法是（1）并行化所有初始化（2）预取所有虚拟环境和二进制文件（3）利用上游仓库（如vLLM和flashinfer）中的缓存。

items.en: Parallel initialization exacerbated latent race conditions with port bindings in the post-training software stack, which became a significant failure point. Several components of the post-training software required ports: (1) Ray control plane (2) vLLM workers and OpenAI servers (3) TCP rendezvous (4) NeMo Gym servers. Due to the high number of processes needing ports on a node, we hit port conflict frequently at 1K GPU scale that were all time-of-check to time-of-use (TOCTOU) race conditions. The pattern we observed was that a component would check if a port was available without claiming it exclusively, and by the time it (or another process it notified) attempted to bind, another process had already claimed the port.
items.zh: 并行初始化加剧了后训练软件栈中端口绑定的潜在竞态条件，这成为一个重要的故障点。后训练软件的多个组件需要端口：（1）Ray控制平面（2）vLLM工作节点和OpenAI服务器（3）TCP rendezvous（4）NeMo Gym服务器。由于节点上需要端口的进程数量众多，我们在1K GPU规模下频繁遇到端口冲突，这些都是检查时间到使用时间（TOCTOU）竞态条件。我们观察到的模式是，一个组件会检查端口是否可用而不独占声明它，当它（或它通知的另一个进程）尝试绑定时，另一个进程已经占用了该端口。

items.en: SWE-RL Infrastructure: Training a model on software engineering tasks requires a gym environment that can execute hundreds of concurrent agent-codebase interactions, each within an isolated sandbox, and return a reward signal derived from real test execution. In the SWE-RL environment in Nemo-Gym, each rollout launches an Apptainer container with the target repository, runs the OpenHands agent loop to produce a code patch, and runs the ground-truth tests to compute a binary reward. Rollouts are distributed across nodes using Ray with a SPREAD scheduling strategy. Below we describe the key components of this environment.
items.zh: SWE-RL基础设施：在软件工程任务上训练模型需要一个gym环境，该环境可以执行数百个并发的智能体-代码库交互，每个交互都在隔离的沙箱中，并返回来自真实测试执行的奖励信号。在Nemo-Gym的SWE-RL环境中，每个rollout启动一个包含目标仓库的Apptainer容器，运行OpenHands智能体循环以生成代码补丁，并运行真实测试以计算二元奖励。Rollout使用SPREAD调度策略通过Ray分布在节点上。下面我们描述该环境的关键组件。

items.en: Container Execution with Apptainer. The absence of root access on our cluster restricts the use of Docker for container isolation. Instead, we use Apptainer (formerly Singularity) to run each SWE task instance in a pre-built container image (.sif files), providing filesystem isolation via a writable tmpfs overlay while sharing the host kernel.
items.zh: 使用Apptainer的容器执行。我们集群上缺少root访问权限限制了使用Docker进行容器隔离。相反，我们使用Apptainer（以前称为Singularity）在预构建的容器镜像（.sif文件）中运行每个SWE任务实例，通过可写的tmpfs overlay提供文件系统隔离，同时共享主机内核。

items.en: OpenHands Agent Loop. The agent loop is executed by a modified version of OpenHands, managing the full lifecycle of each interaction: initializing the runtime, presenting the problem statement, running the agent’s step loop upto a configurable turn limit, extracting the git patch, and cleaning up. The agent interacts with the repository workspace through bash commands and file operations via a tmux-based session.
items.zh: OpenHands智能体循环。智能体循环由修改版的OpenHands执行，管理每个交互的完整生命周期：初始化运行时、呈现问题陈述、运行智能体的步骤循环直到可配置的轮次限制、提取git补丁以及清理。智能体通过基于tmux的会话使用bash命令和文件操作与仓库工作空间交互。

items.en: Memory Management. Since Apptainer containers share host memory and processes (unlike Docker’s cgroup isolation), runaway agent processes can cause OOM conditions affecting the entire node. We implemented a memory watchdog daemon that monitors the aggregate RSS of the tmux process tree and proactively kills processes inside panes when a configurable limit is exceeded, while keeping the tmux server alive for graceful recovery.
items.zh: 内存管理。由于Apptainer容器共享主机内存和进程（与Docker的cgroup隔离不同），失控的智能体进程可能导致OOM条件影响整个节点。我们实现了一个内存看门狗守护进程，监控tmux进程树的聚合RSS，并在超过可配置限制时主动杀死窗格内的进程，同时保持tmux服务器存活以进行优雅恢复。

items.en: Command Blocklist. The shared-kernel nature of Apptainer means an agent issuing killall or pkill could terminate training processes or vLLM servers on the same node. A regex-based command block list intercepts and blocks dangerous commands before execution, returning informative error messages with safer alternatives.
items.zh: 命令黑名单。Apptainer的共享内核特性意味着智能体发出killall或pkill可能会终止同一节点上的训练进程或vLLM服务器。基于正则表达式的命令黑名单在执行前拦截并阻止危险命令，返回带有更安全替代方案的信息性错误消息。

items.en: Harness Diversity. To increase tool diversity during training without building separate harness integrations, we implemented OpenCode and Codex agent classes within OpenHands that match the tool input/output formats of their respective external harnesses (Claude Code and Codex CLI). Both agents plug into OpenHands’ existing runtime and conversation memory, inheriting container management and observation handling.
items.zh: 工具集多样性。为了在训练期间增加工具多样性而不构建单独的工具集集成，我们在OpenHands中实现了OpenCode和Codex智能体类，它们匹配各自外部工具集（Claude Code和Codex CLI）的工具输入/输出格式。两个智能体都插入OpenHands现有的运行时和对话内存，继承容器管理和观察处理。

items.en: Serialization. We replaced Python’s standard json with orjson for serialization of HTTP payloads between the gym and the model server, as each trajectory turn carries prompt token IDs, generated token IDs, and log probabilities, resulting in large payloads that benefit from orjson’s Rust-based implementation.
items.zh: 序列化。我们将Python的标准json替换为orjson，用于gym和模型服务器之间的HTTP负载序列化，因为每个轨迹轮次携带提示token ID、生成的token ID和对数概率，导致负载较大，orjson基于Rust的实现对此有利。

items.en: We evaluate Nemotron 3 Super on the same broad benchmark suite and evaluation stack as Nemotron 3 Nano (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen), covering general knowledge, reasoning, agentic, instruction following, long-context, and multilingual capability. All evaluation results were collected via Nemo Evaluator SDK999https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator and for most benchmarks, the Nemo Skills Harness101010https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Skills. For reproducibility purposes, the open source container on Nemo Skills packaged via NVIDIA’s Nemo Evaluator SDK used for evaluations can be found here111111https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/eval-factory/containers/nemo_skills. In addition to Nemo Skills, the evaluations also used dedicated open-source packaged containers for Tau-2 Bench (default prompt), Terminal Bench Hard (48 tasks), ScaleAI Multi Challenge Multi-turn Instruction Following, Ruler. More details on the evaluation settings can be found in the Nemo Evaluator SDK configs folder121212https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator/tree/main/packages/nemo-evaluator-launcher/examples/nemotron/nemotron-3-super. The following benchmarks are not onboarded yet in our open source tools and for these we used either their official open source implementation or otherwise an internal scaffolding that we plan to open source in the future: SWE Bench Verified (OpenHands), SWE Bench Multilingual (OpenHands), BrowseComp with Search (internal implementation, with Serp API), Terminal Bench Core 2.0 (Harbor).
items.zh: 我们在与Nemotron 3 Nano（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）相同的广泛基准套件和评估栈上评估Nemotron 3 Super，涵盖通用知识、推理、智能体式、指令遵循、长上下文和多语言能力。所有评估结果通过Nemo Evaluator SDK999https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator收集，对于大多数基准，使用Nemo Skills Harness101010https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Skills。为了可重复性，用于评估的Nemo Skills上的开源容器通过NVIDIA的Nemo Evaluator SDK打包，可在此处找到111111https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/eval-factory/containers/nemo_skills。除了Nemo Skills，评估还使用了专用的开源打包容器用于Tau-2 Bench（默认提示）、Terminal Bench Hard（48个任务）、ScaleAI Multi Challenge多轮指令遵循、Ruler。更多评估设置细节可在Nemo Evaluator SDK配置文件夹中找到121212https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Evaluator/tree/main/packages/nemo-evaluator-launcher/examples/nemotron/nemotron-3-super。以下基准尚未在我们的开源工具中集成，对于这些基准，我们使用了它们的官方开源实现或内部脚手架，我们计划在未来开源：SWE Bench Verified（OpenHands）、SWE Bench Multilingual（OpenHands）、BrowseComp with Search（内部实现，使用Serp API）、Terminal Bench Core 2.0（Harbor）。

items.en: We report results on AIME 25, HMMT Feb 25, GPQA (rein2023gpqa), LiveCodeBench v5 (jain2024livecodebench), SciCode (tian2024scicoderesearchcodingbenchmark), and HLE (phan2025humanitysexam). Across all benchmarks Nemotron 3 Super is competitive with GPT-OSS-120B, while lagging behind Qwen-3.5-122B slightly.
items.zh: 我们报告了AIME 25、HMMT Feb 25、GPQA（rein2023gpqa）、LiveCodeBench v5（jain2024livecodebench）、SciCode（tian2024scicoderesearchcodingbenchmark）和HLE（phan2025humanitysexam）的结果。在所有基准上，Nemotron 3 Super与GPT-OSS-120B具有竞争力，同时略落后于Qwen-3.5-122B。

items.en: We report results on TerminalBench (the hard subset and the v2 set), SWE-Bench (OpenHands, OpenCode, Codex, and the Multilingual set) (jimenez2023swe), TauBench V2 (Airline, Retail, Telecom; and their average) (barres2025tau), and BrowseComp (wei2025browsecomp). For Browsecomp, our harness takes strong inspiration from the browser tool released with GPT OSS. (openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel), and we do not evaluate with any context management strategies. For SQL we evaluate on the BIRD benchmark li2023bird dev set (1,534 samples, SQLite, execution accuracy). Across all agentic benchmarks, Nemotron 3 Super outperforms or is competitve with GPT-OSS 120B and is competitive to Qwen 3.5 122B on some harnesses.
items.zh: 我们报告了TerminalBench（hard子集和v2集）、SWE-Bench（OpenHands、OpenCode、Codex和多语言集）（jimenez2023swe）、TauBench V2（Airline、Retail、Telecom及其平均值）（barres2025tau）和BrowseComp（wei2025browsecomp）的结果。对于Browsecomp，我们的工具集从GPT OSS发布的浏览器工具中汲取了强烈灵感。（openai2025gptoss120bgptoss20bmodel），并且我们不使用任何上下文管理策略进行评估。对于SQL，我们在BIRD基准li2023bird开发集（1,534个样本，SQLite，执行准确率）上进行评估。在所有智能体式基准上，Nemotron 3 Super优于或与GPT-OSS 120B具有竞争力，并且在某些工具集上与Qwen 3.5 122B具有竞争力。

items.en: We report results on IFBench, Multi-Challenge, Arena-Hard V2 (li2024wildchat). Across all benchmarks Nemotron 3 Super is competitive with the baseline models.
items.zh: 我们报告了IFBench、Multi-Challenge、Arena-Hard V2（li2024wildchat）的结果。在所有基准上，Nemotron 3 Super与基线模型具有竞争力。

items.en: We report results on Ruler (hsieh2024ruler) using 100 samples per task and AALCR.
items.zh: 我们报告了Ruler（hsieh2024ruler）的结果，每个任务使用100个样本和AALCR。

items.en: We measure multilingual capability on MMLU-ProX (xuan2025mmlu) and WMT24++ en→\rightarrowxx (deutsch2025wmt24++). Nemotron 3 Super matches or outperforms the baseline models on both bencharks.
items.zh: 我们在MMLU-ProX（xuan2025mmlu）和WMT24++ en→→xx（deutsch2025wmt24++）上衡量多语言能力。Nemotron 3 Super在两个基准上匹配或优于基线模型。

items.en: For comparison with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen-3.5-122B-A10B, we use officially reported numbers whenever available; when not available, we follow the Nemotron 3 Nano report (nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen) procedure of either sourcing values from reputable public aggregators (when consistent with the official protocol) or computing scores ourselves using the official evaluation settings.
items.zh: 为了与GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen-3.5-122B-A10B进行比较，我们尽可能使用官方报告的数字；当不可用时，我们遵循Nemotron 3 Nano报告（nvidia2025nemotron3nanoopen）的程序，要么从信誉良好的公共聚合器获取值（当与官方协议一致时），要么使用官方评估设置自行计算分数。

items.en: We apply post-training quantization (PTQ) using Model-Optimizer131313https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer/ to quantize weights and activations to generate two efficient deployment checkpoints: FP8 (W8A8) for Hopper and NVFP4 (W4A4) for Blackwell.
items.zh: 我们使用 Model-Optimizer131313https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer/ 应用后训练量化（PTQ）对权重和激活进行量化，生成两个高效的部署检查点：用于 Hopper 的 FP8（W8A8）和用于 Blackwell 的 NVFP4（W4A4）。

items.en: For FP8 PTQ calibration, we used a small subset containing 256 samples with 65536 context length from the post-training SFT dataset. For FP8 quantization, we quantized MoE GEMMs, both routed and shared, and Mamba Linear layers. We also kept the KV Cache in FP8, whereas Mamba state cache has been quantized to FP16 for speedup. The precision assignments for the different operators in this checkpoint are summarized in Table 6.
items.zh: 对于 FP8 PTQ 校准，我们使用了来自后训练 SFT 数据集的 256 个样本（上下文长度为 65536）的小子集。对于 FP8 量化，我们对 MoE GEMM（包括路由和共享）以及 Mamba 线性层进行了量化。我们还将 KV 缓存保持在 FP8，而 Mamba 状态缓存被量化为 FP16 以加速。该检查点中不同算子的精度分配总结在表 6 中。

items.en: FP4 is a more aggressive quantization format than FP8 and is particularly attractive for prefill-heavy inference workloads, such as coding-agent deployments, where linear and MoE GEMMs are major performance bottlenecks. NVFP4 is natively accelerated on Blackwell GPUs and delivers better accuracy than alternative FP4 formats such as MXFP4 (nvfp4_mxfp4). NVFP4 for inference (nvpfp4_ptq_default) uses signed E2M1 values with per-block scaling over 1D blocks of size 16 along the last dimension. These per-block scales are further quantized into FP8 E4M3 using a per-tensor statically calibrated FP32 scaling factor.
items.zh: FP4 是一种比 FP8 更激进的量化格式，对于预填充密集型推理工作负载（例如编码智能体部署）特别有吸引力，其中线性层和 MoE GEMM 是主要的性能瓶颈。NVFP4 在 Blackwell GPU 上原生加速，并提供比 MXFP4（nvfp4_mxfp4）等替代 FP4 格式更好的精度。用于推理的 NVFP4（nvpfp4_ptq_default）使用有符号 E2M1 值，并在最后一个维度上对大小为 16 的一维块进行逐块缩放。这些逐块缩放因子进一步使用逐张量静态校准的 FP32 缩放因子量化为 FP8 E4M3。

items.en: In the baseline NVFP4 PTQ recipe (nvpfp4_ptq_default), each per-block scale is determined by the maximum absolute value in the block. We evaluated a range of alternative PTQ methods. The results of these experiments can be found in Appendix B.1. The best overall results were obtained with a hybrid FP4 recipe: weight per-block scales were selected by minimizing weight MSE, while activation per-block scales continued to use max-based scaling. This choice is both effective and practical. Weight quantization is calibrated offline so an expensive scale search can be performed without impacting runtime performance. Activation quantization must be computed efficiently at runtime, making scale search algorithms impractical. Max-based scaling of activations provides a good trade-off between runtime performance and quantization accuracy.
items.zh: 在基线 NVFP4 PTQ 方案（nvpfp4_ptq_default）中，每个逐块缩放因子由块中的最大绝对值决定。我们评估了一系列替代 PTQ 方法。这些实验的结果可以在附录 B.1 中找到。最佳整体结果是通过混合 FP4 方案获得的：权重逐块缩放因子通过最小化权重 MSE 选择，而激活逐块缩放因子继续使用基于最大值的缩放。这种选择既有效又实用。权重量化是离线校准的，因此可以在不影响运行时性能的情况下进行昂贵的缩放搜索。激活量化必须在运行时高效计算，使得缩放搜索算法不切实际。基于最大值的激活缩放提供了运行时性能和量化精度之间的良好权衡。

items.en: In addition, we selectively promoted some layers from FP4 (W4A4) to FP8 (W8A8) or BF16 (W16A16) to further improve accuracy. We used Model-Optimizer AutoQuantize 141414https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer/tree/main/examples/llm_ptq, a neural architecture search (NAS) inspired method for deriving optimal mixed-precision assignments. AutoQuantize estimates per-operation sensitivity, models the performance cost of available quantization choices, and solves for the optimal layer-wise allocation using a knapsack-style optimization procedure. Its sensitivity metric follows a second-order Taylor approximation inspired by Optimal Brain Surgeon (obs), as introduced in LLM-MQ (llmmq). AutoQuantize generalizes LLM-MQ beyond weight-only quantization. It supports operator-level quantization, including joint weight-and-activation quantization for GEMMs, and accounts for inference deployment constraints such as operator fusion. The detailed AutoQuantize algorithm is given in B.2.
items.zh: 此外，我们选择性地将一些层从 FP4（W4A4）提升到 FP8（W8A8）或 BF16（W16A16）以进一步提高精度。我们使用了 Model-Optimizer AutoQuantize 141414https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer/tree/main/examples/llm_ptq，这是一种受神经架构搜索（NAS）启发的方法，用于推导最优混合精度分配。AutoQuantize 估计每个算子的敏感性，建模可用量化选择的性能成本，并使用背包式优化过程求解最优逐层分配。其敏感性度量遵循受最优脑外科医生（OBS）启发的二阶泰勒近似，如 LLM-MQ（llmmq）中引入的。AutoQuantize 将 LLM-MQ 推广到超越仅权重量化。它支持算子级量化，包括 GEMM 的联合权重和激活量化，并考虑推理部署约束，如算子融合。详细的 AutoQuantize 算法在 B.2 中给出。

items.en: Overall, our final NVFP4 PTQ recipe combines:
items.zh: 总体而言，我们最终的 NVFP4 PTQ 方案结合了：

items.en: calibrated per-block weight scaling that minimizes MSE,
items.zh: 校准的逐块权重缩放，最小化 MSE，

items.en: dynamic per-block max-based activation scaling, and
items.zh: 动态逐块基于最大值的激活缩放，以及

items.en: selective promotion of sensitive layers through Model-Optimizer AutoQuantize.
items.zh: 通过 Model-Optimizer AutoQuantize 选择性提升敏感层。

items.en: This combination addresses the accuracy loss of naive NVFP4 PTQ while preserving the runtime efficiency needed for deployment. The resulting per-operator precision assignments in the final NVFP4 checkpoint are summarized in Table 7.
items.zh: 这种组合解决了朴素 NVFP4 PTQ 的精度损失，同时保留了部署所需的运行时效率。最终 NVFP4 检查点中每个算子的精度分配总结在表 7 中。

items.en: Combining AutoQuantize with the improved NVFP4 PTQ recipe produced a mostly-FP4 model, with only a small subset of layers retained in FP8 or BF16 for accuracy preservation. The full mixed-precision PTQ process completed in less than 2 hours on a single B200 node with 8 GPUs, using 512 samples from the Nemotron 3 Super SFT dataset at sequence length 4096. The resulting model achieved 99.8% median accuracy relative to the BF16 baseline while retaining near-FP4 performance. Final evaluation results are reported in Table 8.
items.zh: 将 AutoQuantize 与改进的 NVFP4 PTQ 方案相结合，产生了一个主要为 FP4 的模型，只有一小部分层保留在 FP8 或 BF16 中以保持精度。完整的混合精度 PTQ 过程在单个 B200 节点（8 个 GPU）上使用 Nemotron 3 Super SFT 数据集的 512 个样本（序列长度 4096）在不到 2 小时内完成。生成的模型相对于 BF16 基线实现了 99.8% 的中位精度，同时保持了接近 FP4 的性能。最终评估结果在表 8 中报告。

items.en: In memory-bound settings, DRAM reads of the Mamba state cache (SSM cache) become a major bottleneck to decoding speed. The SSM cache is stored in FP32 by default. One option is to store the SSM cache in FP16 while arithmetic executes in FP32. In this case, the cache is fetched from memory in FP16, upcast to FP32 for the recurrent update, and then cast back to FP16 for storage. Table 9 shows experiments on an early checkpoint of Nemotron 3 Super. These results show that directly casting the SSM cache to FP16 can result in up to 40% increase in verbosity when combined with W8A8 quantization. Even with maintaining weights and activations in BF16, casting the SSM cache to FP16 leads to up to 37% increase in verbosity.
items.zh: 在内存受限的设置中，Mamba 状态缓存（SSM 缓存）的 DRAM 读取成为解码速度的主要瓶颈。SSM 缓存默认以 FP32 存储。一种选择是将 SSM 缓存存储在 FP16 中，而算术运算以 FP32 执行。在这种情况下，缓存以 FP16 从内存中取出，向上转换为 FP32 进行循环更新，然后转换回 FP16 存储。表 9 显示了在 Nemotron 3 Super 的早期检查点上的实验。这些结果表明，当与 W8A8 量化结合时，直接将 SSM 缓存转换为 FP16 可能导致冗长度增加高达 40%。即使将权重和激活保持在 BF16，将 SSM 缓存转换为 FP16 也会导致冗长度增加高达 37%。

items.en: A key challenge in quantizing the Mamba cache is that quantization error does not remain local to a single step. Because Mamba decoding is recurrent, quantization error from previous steps propagates into future steps and accumulates over time. This accumulation of quantization error can be seen by unrolling the recurrent update. Let the recurrent state update be ht=At​ht−1+Bt​xth_{t}=A_{t}h_{t-1}+B_{t}x_{t}, and let cache quantization at step tt introduce an additive error ete_{t}, so that hq,t=At​hq,t−1+Bt​xt+eth_{q,t}=A_{t}h_{q,t-1}+B_{t}x_{t}+e_{t}. Unrolling this recursion gives
items.zh: 量化 Mamba 缓存的一个关键挑战是量化误差不会局限于单个步骤。由于 Mamba 解码是循环的，先前步骤的量化误差会传播到未来步骤并随时间累积。这种量化误差的累积可以通过展开循环更新来看出。设循环状态更新为 ht=At​ht−1+Bt​xt，并且步骤 t 的缓存量化引入加性误差 et，因此 hq,t=At​hq,t−1+Bt​xt+et。展开此递归得到

items.en: showing that quantization error from earlier steps is propagated through subsequent recurrent transitions and can accumulate over decoding time.
items.zh: 表明早期步骤的量化误差通过后续循环转换传播，并可能在解码过程中累积。

items.en: Addressing these quantization errors through changes in training (e.g., QAT or QAD) is non-trivial. Mamba training uses the chunked State Space Duality algorithm which does not explicitly materialize the recurrence relationship and the inference-time cache. Accurately modeling the recurrent decode-time cache behavior during training introduces substantial overhead. We therefore focused on training-free methods to recover the accuracy lost from cache quantization.
items.zh: 通过训练中的变化（例如 QAT 或 QAD）来解决这些量化误差并非易事。Mamba 训练使用分块状态对偶算法，该算法不显式体现递归关系和推理时缓存。在训练期间准确建模循环解码时缓存行为会引入大量开销。因此，我们专注于无训练方法来恢复缓存量化损失的精度。

items.en: One way to decrease the accumulation of quantization error during PTQ is to increase the mantissa precision. We explored this by using INT16 instead of FP16 for the SSM cache. Naive INT16 quantization did not improve verbosity as tensor-level analysis showed that the SSM cache has a wide dynamic range. We then introduced FP32 per-block scaling over blocks of size 128 along the state dimension to increase effective dynamic range. This eliminated the verbosity issue (Table 9).
items.zh: 在 PTQ 期间减少量化误差累积的一种方法是增加尾数精度。我们通过使用 INT16 而不是 FP16 作为 SSM 缓存来探索这一点。朴素的 INT16 量化没有改善冗长度，因为张量级分析显示 SSM 缓存具有宽动态范围。然后我们引入了 FP32 逐块缩放（沿状态维度块大小为 128）以增加有效动态范围。这消除了冗长度问题（表 9）。

items.en: We also explored a hypothesis that the error accumulation was tied to rounding during the cast from FP32 to FP16. The key issue is that round to nearest, ties on even (RTNE) introduces bias in the quantization process. Because RTNE maps a given input to the same rounded value, its quantization error has zero variance but non-zero bias relative to the original value. In contrast, stochastic rounding (SR) is unbiased in expectation. In a recurrent setting, the bias from RTNE accumulates coherently over time, whereas stochastic rounding replaces this systematic drift with zero-mean noise. Based on this observation, we applied stochastic rounding before casting the cache to FP16 which fixed the verbosity issue for both the BF16 baseline and the FP8 checkpoint (Table 9).
items.zh: 我们还探索了一个假设，即误差累积与从 FP32 到 FP16 的转换过程中的舍入有关。关键问题是最近舍入（RTNE）在量化过程中引入了偏差。由于 RTNE 将给定输入映射到相同的舍入值，其量化误差相对于原始值具有零方差但非零偏差。相比之下，随机舍入（SR）在期望上是无偏的。在循环设置中，RTNE 的偏差随时间一致地累积，而随机舍入用零均值噪声替代了这种系统性漂移。基于这一观察，我们在将缓存转换为 FP16 之前应用了随机舍入，这修复了 BF16 基线和 FP8 检查点的冗长度问题（表 9）。

items.en: It does not require calculating, storing, and loading block scale factors.
items.zh: 它不需要计算、存储和加载块缩放因子。

items.en: Blackwell provides a dedicated PTX instruction for stochastic rounding during type conversion.
items.zh: Blackwell 在类型转换期间提供了用于随机舍入的专用 PTX 指令。

items.en: Blackwell supports Philox-based pseudorandom number generation through cuRAND.
items.zh: Blackwell 通过 cuRAND 支持基于 Philox 的伪随机数生成。

items.en: To further improve efficiency, Table 9 also varies the number of Philox rounds. Increasing the number of rounds improves the statistical quality of the generated values, while reducing the number of rounds lowers pseudorandom number generation overhead. Philox<5> was chosen to maintain accuracy and verbosity while minimizing pseudorandom number generation overhead.
items.zh: 为了进一步提高效率，表9还改变了Philox轮数。增加轮数可提高生成值的统计质量，而减少轮数可降低伪随机数生成开销。选择Philox<5>以在最小化伪随机数生成开销的同时保持准确性和详细程度。

items.en: We introduce Nemotron 3 Super, a 12B active and 120B total parameter MoE hybrid Mamba-Attention model with strong agentic capabilities. Nemotron 3 Super employs LatentMoE to improve accuracy and incorporates MTP layers to accelerate inference via speculative decoding. We pretrained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion text tokens with low-precision NVFP4, followed by post-training on a diverse set of RL environments. Finally, we quantized the model to FP8 and NVFP4, achieving significantly higher inference throughput without sacrificing model accuracy. Nemotron 3 Super achieves up to 2.2×\times higher throughput than GPT-OSS-120B while maintaining higher accuracy across a wide range of tasks. We release the pre-trained, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints for Nemotron 3 Super on HuggingFace.
items.zh: 我们推出了Nemotron 3 Super，这是一个拥有120B总参数（12B活跃参数）的MoE混合Mamba-Attention模型，具有强大的智能体能力。Nemotron 3 Super采用LatentMoE提高准确性，并引入MTP层通过推测解码加速推理。我们在25万亿文本token上使用低精度NVFP4预训练了Nemotron 3 Super，随后在多样化的RL环境中进行后训练。最后，我们将模型量化为FP8和NVFP4，在不牺牲模型准确性的情况下显著提高了推理吞吐量。Nemotron 3 Super在广泛任务上实现了高达GPT-OSS-120B 2.2倍的吞吐量，同时保持更高的准确性。我们在HuggingFace上发布了Nemotron 3 Super的预训练、后训练和量化检查点。

items.capEn: Figure 17: Per-benchmark accuracy for trained checkpoints versus the best offline checkpoint merge across the full 25T-token training run. The 12 benchmarks span general knowledge (MMLU-Pro, MMLU), code generation (HumanEval, HumanEval+, MBPP, MBPP+), mathematical reasoning (GSM8K, MATH-500), and commonsense understanding (RACE, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande). The shaded region indicates the LR decay phase.
items.capZh: 图17：训练检查点与整个25T token训练运行中最佳离线检查点合并的每个基准准确率。12个基准涵盖通用知识（MMLU-Pro, MMLU）、代码生成（HumanEval, HumanEval+, MBPP, MBPP+）、数学推理（GSM8K, MATH-500）和常识理解（RACE, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande）。阴影区域表示学习率衰减阶段。

items.en: This section shows evaluation accuracy for various PTQ algorithms. In these experiments, all linear layers except the final classification layer and attention linear layers are quantized to NVFP4.
items.zh: 本节展示了各种PTQ算法的评估准确率。在这些实验中，除最终分类层和注意力线性层外，所有线性层都量化为NVFP4。

items.en: The sensitivity of each operation is measured at its immediate (or closest available) output using a second-order metric:
items.zh: 每个操作的敏感性在其直接（或最接近的）输出处使用二阶度量进行测量：

items.en: where ii indexes operators, Qi,fQ_{i,f} denotes the quantized operator under format choice ff for operator ii, and HiH_{i} is the local Hessian approximation at the selected measurement point. The measurement point YiY_{i} can be any location where quantization error is compared against BF16; for linear layers, we use the linear-layer output.
items.zh: 其中ii索引操作符，Qi,fQ_{i,f}表示操作符ii在格式选择ff下的量化操作符，HiH_{i}是所选测量点处的局部Hessian近似。测量点YiY_{i}可以是任何将量化误差与BF16进行比较的位置；对于线性层，我们使用线性层输出。

items.en: Inference runtimes often fuse linear operators, which imposes a shared quantization format across the fused group. This fusion constraint is applied within each layer: only that layer’s Q, K, and V projections are fused and required to share one quantization format. For the fused QKV projection, we model the group as one decision variable and aggregate sensitivity and cost as
items.zh: 推理运行时通常融合线性算子，这要求融合组内共享量化格式。此融合约束在每一层内应用：只有该层的Q、K和V投影被融合，并要求共享一种量化格式。对于融合的QKV投影，我们将该组建模为一个决策变量，并聚合敏感性和成本为

items.en: This formulation is valid under our second-order sensitivity approximation: when the fused operator enforces one shared format but preserves additive branch contributions, the quadratic sensitivity term for the fused output remains additive across Q, K, and V.
items.zh: 该公式在我们的二阶敏感性近似下是有效的：当融合算子强制使用一种共享格式但保留加性分支贡献时，融合输出的二次敏感性项在Q、K和V上保持加性。

items.en: vLLM and TensorRT-LLM quantized MoE APIs require all sparse experts in a constrained MoE group to share one quantization format. This shared-format restriction is also applied within each MoE layer: only sparse experts inside the same layer are coupled. In Nemotron 3 Super, each sparse expert contains up_proj and down_proj, and these sparse-expert projections must therefore be assigned jointly. We formulate the sparse-expert set as one operator-level decision,
items.zh: vLLM和TensorRT-LLM量化的MoE API要求受约束的MoE组中的所有稀疏专家共享一种量化格式。此共享格式限制也在每个MoE层内应用：只有同一层内的稀疏专家耦合在一起。在Nemotron 3 Super中，每个稀疏专家包含up_proj和down_proj，因此这些稀疏专家投影必须联合分配。我们将稀疏专家集公式化为一个算子级决策，

items.en: where moe\mathrm{moe} denotes the MoE sparse-expert group (all coupled sparse-expert up_proj/down_proj operators within one MoE layer). We measure sensitivity at the MoE block output so that the metric captures the combined contribution from all sparse experts,
items.zh: 其中moe\mathrm{moe}表示MoE稀疏专家组（一个MoE层内所有耦合的稀疏专家up_proj/down_proj算子）。我们在MoE块输出处测量敏感性，以便度量捕捉所有稀疏专家的组合贡献，

items.en: and define the deployment cost as the sum over sparse experts,
items.zh: 并将部署成本定义为稀疏专家的总和，

items.en: Other linear layers in the MoE block, such as latent projection layers and shared experts, are not part of this sparse-expert coupling constraint and can be assigned different quantization formats.
items.zh: MoE块中的其他线性层，如潜在投影层和共享专家，不属于此稀疏专家耦合约束，可以分配不同的量化格式。
